authors_text: Florent Bonnet,Ahmed Jocelyn Mazari,Paola Cinnella,Patrick Gallinari
title: AirfRANS: High Fidelity Computational Fluid Dynamics Dataset for Approximating Reynolds-Averaged Navier-Stokes Solutions
title_zh: AirfRANS：用于近似雷诺平均纳维-斯托克斯解的高保真计算流体动力学数据集
comment: ef:36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
comments: ef:36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
abstract: Surrogate models are necessary to optimize meaningful quantities in physical dynamics as their recursive numerical resolutions are often prohibitively expensive. It is mainly the case for fluid dynamics and the resolution of Navier-Stokes equations. However, despite the fast-growing field of data-driven models for physical systems, reference datasets representing real-world phenomena are lacking. In this work, we develop AirfRANS, a dataset for studying the two-dimensional incompressible steady-state Reynolds-Averaged Navier-Stokes equations over airfoils at a subsonic regime and for different angles of attacks. We also introduce metrics on the stress forces at the surface of geometries and visualization of boundary layers to assess the capabilities of models to accurately predict the meaningful information of the problem. Finally, we propose deep learning baselines on four machine learning tasks to study AirfRANS under different constraints for generalization considerations: big and scarce data regime, Reynolds number, and angle of attack extrapolation.
summary: Surrogate models are necessary to optimize meaningful quantities in physical dynamics as their recursive numerical resolutions are often prohibitively expensive. It is mainly the case for fluid dynamics and the resolution of Navier-Stokes equations. However, despite the fast-growing field of data-driven models for physical systems, reference datasets representing real-world phenomena are lacking. In this work, we develop AirfRANS, a dataset for studying the two-dimensional incompressible steady-state Reynolds-Averaged Navier-Stokes equations over airfoils at a subsonic regime and for different angles of attacks. We also introduce metrics on the stress forces at the surface of geometries and visualization of boundary layers to assess the capabilities of models to accurately predict the meaningful information of the problem. Finally, we propose deep learning baselines on four machine learning tasks to study AirfRANS under different constraints for generalization considerations: big and scarce data regime, Reynolds number, and angle of attack extrapolation.
abstract_zh: 替代模型对于优化物理动力学中有意义的量是必要的，因为它们的递归数值分辨率通常非常昂贵。主要是流体动力学和纳维-斯托克斯方程的求解。然而，尽管物理系统数据驱动模型领域快速发展，但仍缺乏代表现实世界现象的参考数据集。在这项工作中，我们开发了 AirfRANS，这是一个用于研究亚音速状态和不同攻角下翼型的二维不可压缩稳态雷诺平均纳维斯托克斯方程的数据集。我们还引入了几何表面应力的指标和边界层的可视化，以评估模型准确预测问题的有意义信息的能力。最后，我们提出了四个机器学习任务的深度学习基线，以在不同约束下研究 AirfRANS，以进行泛化考虑：大且稀缺的数据体系、雷诺数和攻角外推。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个名为AirfRANS的高保真计算流体力学数据集，用于近似雷诺平均纳维-斯托克斯方程的解，并评估模型预测能力。
AI.motivation: 传统数值解法计算成本高，而数据驱动模型缺乏真实现象的参考数据集，限制了代理模型的发展。
AI.method: 构建二维不可压缩定常RANS方程数据集，引入表面应力力指标和边界层可视化方法，提出四种机器学习任务的深度学习基线模型。
AI.result: 成功生成涵盖不同攻角和雷诺数的高质量数据集，验证了模型在数据量、参数外推等场景下的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: AirfRANS填补了物理系统数据集的空白，为流体力学代理模型研究提供了基准资源，并展示了模型泛化能力的评估框架。

authors_text: Yiming Hou,Mahdi Rezaei,Richard Romano
title: Multi-level and multi-modal feature fusion for accurate 3D object detection in Connected and Automated Vehicles
title_zh: 多层次和多模态特征融合，用于互联和自动驾驶车辆中精确的 3D 物体检测
abstract: Aiming at highly accurate object detection for connected and automated vehicles (CAVs), this paper presents a Deep Neural Network based 3D object detection model that leverages a three-stage feature extractor by developing a novel LIDAR-Camera fusion scheme. The proposed feature extractor extracts high-level features from two input sensory modalities and recovers the important features discarded during the convolutional process. The novel fusion scheme effectively fuses features across sensory modalities and convolutional layers to find the best representative global features. The fused features are shared by a two-stage network: the region proposal network (RPN) and the detection head (DH). The RPN generates high-recall proposals, and the DH produces final detection results. The experimental results show the proposed model outperforms more recent research on the KITTI 2D and 3D detection benchmark, particularly for distant and highly occluded instances.
summary: Aiming at highly accurate object detection for connected and automated vehicles (CAVs), this paper presents a Deep Neural Network based 3D object detection model that leverages a three-stage feature extractor by developing a novel LIDAR-Camera fusion scheme. The proposed feature extractor extracts high-level features from two input sensory modalities and recovers the important features discarded during the convolutional process. The novel fusion scheme effectively fuses features across sensory modalities and convolutional layers to find the best representative global features. The fused features are shared by a two-stage network: the region proposal network (RPN) and the detection head (DH). The RPN generates high-recall proposals, and the DH produces final detection results. The experimental results show the proposed model outperforms more recent research on the KITTI 2D and 3D detection benchmark, particularly for distant and highly occluded instances.
abstract_zh: 针对联网自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 的高精度目标检测，本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的 3D 目标检测模型，该模型通过开发一种新颖的激光雷达相机融合方案来利用三级特征提取器。所提出的特征提取器从两种输入感觉模态中提取高级特征，并恢复在卷积过程中丢弃的重要特征。新颖的融合方案有效地融合了感觉模态和卷积层的特征，以找到最具代表性的全局特征。融合的特征由两级网络共享：区域提议网络（RPN）和检测头（DH）。 RPN 生成高召回率提案，DH 生成最终检测结果。实验结果表明，所提出的模型优于 KITTI 2D 和 3D 检测基准的最新研究，特别是对于远处和高度遮挡的实例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络的3D目标检测模型，通过多级多模态特征融合提升连接和自动驾驶车辆的检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂场景下对远距离和高度遮挡目标的检测精度不足，需改进多模态传感器数据的融合策略以提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计三级特征提取器实现LIDAR与摄像头数据的跨模态跨层特征融合，通过两阶段网络（RPN生成候选框，DH输出检测结果）提升检测性能。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上优于最新算法，尤其在远距离和高度遮挡目标检测中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 多级多模态特征融合策略有效提升了3D目标检测的准确性，为自动驾驶场景提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Anindita Ghosh,Rishabh Dabral,Vladislav Golyanik,Christian Theobalt,Philipp Slusallek
title: IMos: Intent-Driven Full-Body Motion Synthesis for Human-Object Interactions
title_zh: IMos：用于人与物体交互的意图驱动的全身运动合成
abstract: Can we make virtual characters in a scene interact with their surrounding objects through simple instructions? Is it possible to synthesize such motion plausibly with a diverse set of objects and instructions? Inspired by these questions, we present the first framework to synthesize the full-body motion of virtual human characters performing specified actions with 3D objects placed within their reach. Our system takes textual instructions specifying the objects and the associated intentions of the virtual characters as input and outputs diverse sequences of full-body motions. This contrasts existing works, where full-body action synthesis methods generally do not consider object interactions, and human-object interaction methods focus mainly on synthesizing hand or finger movements for grasping objects. We accomplish our objective by designing an intent-driven fullbody motion generator, which uses a pair of decoupled conditional variational auto-regressors to learn the motion of the body parts in an autoregressive manner. We also optimize the 6-DoF pose of the objects such that they plausibly fit within the hands of the synthesized characters. We compare our proposed method with the existing methods of motion synthesis and establish a new and stronger state-of-the-art for the task of intent-driven motion synthesis.
summary: Can we make virtual characters in a scene interact with their surrounding objects through simple instructions? Is it possible to synthesize such motion plausibly with a diverse set of objects and instructions? Inspired by these questions, we present the first framework to synthesize the full-body motion of virtual human characters performing specified actions with 3D objects placed within their reach. Our system takes textual instructions specifying the objects and the associated intentions of the virtual characters as input and outputs diverse sequences of full-body motions. This contrasts existing works, where full-body action synthesis methods generally do not consider object interactions, and human-object interaction methods focus mainly on synthesizing hand or finger movements for grasping objects. We accomplish our objective by designing an intent-driven fullbody motion generator, which uses a pair of decoupled conditional variational auto-regressors to learn the motion of the body parts in an autoregressive manner. We also optimize the 6-DoF pose of the objects such that they plausibly fit within the hands of the synthesized characters. We compare our proposed method with the existing methods of motion synthesis and establish a new and stronger state-of-the-art for the task of intent-driven motion synthesis.
abstract_zh: 我们能否通过简单的指令让场景中的虚拟角色与周围的物体进行交互？是否有可能通过一组不同的对象和指令合理地合成这样的运动？受这些问题的启发，我们提出了第一个框架，用于合成虚拟人物角色的全身运动，并通过放置在其可及范围内的 3D 对象来执行指定的动作。我们的系统采用指定虚拟角色的对象和相关意图的文本指令作为输入，并输出不同的全身运动序列。这与现有的工作形成鲜明对比，现有的全身动作合成方法通常不考虑对象交互，而人与对象交互方法主要关注合成手或手指运动以抓取对象。我们通过设计一个意图驱动的全身运动生成器来实现我们的目标，该生成器使用一对解耦的条件变分自回归器以自回归方式学习身体部位的运动。我们还优化了对象的 6-DoF 姿势，使它们能够合理地适合合成角色的手中。我们将我们提出的方法与现有的运动合成方法进行比较，并为意图驱动的运动合成任务建立了一种新的、更强大的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于意图的全身运动合成框架IMos，通过文本指令生成虚拟角色与三维物体互动的合理全身运动序列。
AI.motivation: 现有全身动作合成方法大多忽略物体交互，而人-物交互方法仅关注手部动作，缺乏对全身运动与物体姿态协同的综合建模。
AI.method: 设计意图驱动的全身运动生成器，采用解耦的条件变分自回归模型分步生成身体部位运动，并优化物体6自由度姿态使其与合成动作合理配合。
AI.result: 在意图驱动运动合成任务中相较现有方法取得显著提升，建立新的状态-of-the-art基准。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可生成多样化且物理合理的全身交互动作，为虚拟角色与环境的自然交互提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.result: 在意图驱动运动合成任务中相较现有方法取得显著提升，建立新的状态-of-the-art基准。

search_text: IMos: Intent-Driven Full-Body Motion Synthesis for Human-Object Interactions IMos：用于人与物体交互的意图驱动的全身运动合成 Can we make virtual characters in a scene interact with their surrounding objects through simple instructions? Is it possible to synthesize such motion plausibly with a diverse set of objects and instructions? Inspired by these questions, we present the first framework to synthesize the full-body motion of virtual human characters performing specified actions with 3D objects placed within their reach. Our system takes textual instructions specifying the objects and the associated intentions of the virtual characters as input and outputs diverse sequences of full-body motions. This contrasts existing works, where full-body action synthesis methods generally do not consider object interactions, and human-object interaction methods focus mainly on synthesizing hand or finger movements for grasping objects. We accomplish our objective by designing an intent-driven fullbody motion generator, which uses a pair of decoupled conditional variational auto-regressors to learn the motion of the body parts in an autoregressive manner. We also optimize the 6-DoF pose of the objects such that they plausibly fit within the hands of the synthesized characters. We compare our proposed method with the existing methods of motion synthesis and establish a new and stronger state-of-the-art for the task of intent-driven motion synthesis. 我们能否通过简单的指令让场景中的虚拟角色与周围的物体进行交互？是否有可能通过一组不同的对象和指令合理地合成这样的运动？受这些问题的启发，我们提出了第一个框架，用于合成虚拟人物角色的全身运动，并通过放置在其可及范围内的 3D 对象来执行指定的动作。我们的系统采用指定虚拟角色的对象和相关意图的文本指令作为输入，并输出不同的全身运动序列。这与现有的工作形成鲜明对比，现有的全身动作合成方法通常不考虑对象交互，而人与对象交互方法主要关注合成手或手指运动以抓取对象。我们通过设计一个意图驱动的全身运动生成器来实现我们的目标，该生成器使用一对解耦的条件变分自回归器以自回归方式学习身体部位的运动。我们还优化了对象的 6-DoF 姿势，使它们能够合理地适合合成角色的手中。我们将我们提出的方法与现有的运动合成方法进行比较，并为意图驱动的运动合成任务建立了一种新的、更强大的最先进方法。 本文提出一种基于意图的全身运动合成框架IMos，通过文本指令生成虚拟角色与三维物体互动的合理全身运动序列。 Anindita Ghosh,Rishabh Dabral,Vladislav Golyanik,Christian Theobalt,Philipp Slusallek cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Callum Rhodes,Cunjia Liu,Wen-Hua Chen
title: Structurally aware 3D gas distribution mapping using belief propagation: a real-time algorithm for robotic deployment
title_zh: 使用置信传播进行结构感知 3D 气体分布映射：用于机器人部署的实时算法
abstract: This paper proposes a new 3D gas distribution mapping technique based on the local message passing of Gaussian belief propagation that is capable of resolving in real time, concentration estimates in 3D space whilst accounting for the obstacle information within the scenario, the first of its kind in the literature. The gas mapping problem is formulated as a 3D factor graph of Gaussian potentials, the connections of which are conditioned on local occupancy values. The Gaussian belief propagation framework is introduced as the solver and a new hybrid message scheduler is introduced to increase the rate of convergence. The factor graph problem is then redesigned as a dynamically expanding inference task, coupling the information of consecutive gas measurements with local spatial structure obtained by the robot. The proposed algorithm is compared to the state of the art methods in 2D and 3D simulations and is found to resolve distribution maps orders of magnitude quicker than typical direct solvers. The proposed framework is then deployed for the first time onboard a ground robot in a 3D mapping and exploration task. The system is shown to be able to resolve multiple sensor inputs and output high resolution 3D gas distribution maps in a GPS denied cluttered scenario in real time. This online inference of complicated plume structures provides a new layer of contextual information over its 2D counterparts and enables autonomous systems to take advantage of real time estimates to inform potential next best sampling locations.
summary: This paper proposes a new 3D gas distribution mapping technique based on the local message passing of Gaussian belief propagation that is capable of resolving in real time, concentration estimates in 3D space whilst accounting for the obstacle information within the scenario, the first of its kind in the literature. The gas mapping problem is formulated as a 3D factor graph of Gaussian potentials, the connections of which are conditioned on local occupancy values. The Gaussian belief propagation framework is introduced as the solver and a new hybrid message scheduler is introduced to increase the rate of convergence. The factor graph problem is then redesigned as a dynamically expanding inference task, coupling the information of consecutive gas measurements with local spatial structure obtained by the robot. The proposed algorithm is compared to the state of the art methods in 2D and 3D simulations and is found to resolve distribution maps orders of magnitude quicker than typical direct solvers. The proposed framework is then deployed for the first time onboard a ground robot in a 3D mapping and exploration task. The system is shown to be able to resolve multiple sensor inputs and output high resolution 3D gas distribution maps in a GPS denied cluttered scenario in real time. This online inference of complicated plume structures provides a new layer of contextual information over its 2D counterparts and enables autonomous systems to take advantage of real time estimates to inform potential next best sampling locations.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于高斯置信传播的局部消息传递的新 3D 气体分布测绘技术，该技术能够实时解析 3D 空间中的浓度估计，同时考虑场景内的障碍物信息，这在文献中尚属首次。气体映射问题被表述为高斯势的 3D 因子图，其连接以局部占用值为条件。引入高斯置信传播框架作为求解器，并引入新的混合消息调度器以提高收敛速度。然后，因子图问题被重新设计为动态扩展的推理任务，将连续气体测量的信息与机器人获得的局部空间结构耦合起来。将所提出的算法与 2D 和 3D 模拟中最先进的方法进行比较，发现解决分布图的速度比典型的直接求解器快几个数量级。然后，所提出的框架首次部署在地面机器人上，执行 3D 测绘和探索任务。该系统能够在 GPS 无法识别的杂乱场景中实时解析多个传感器输入并输出高分辨率 3D 气体分布图。这种对复杂羽流结构的在线推理提供了比二维羽流结构新的上下文信息层，并使自主系统能够利用实时估计来告知潜在的下一个最佳采样位置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯信念传播的实时3D气体分布映射算法，用于机器人部署，能够实时估计3D空间中的气体浓度并考虑障碍物信息。
AI.motivation: 现有气体分布映射方法在处理复杂障碍物环境和实时性方面存在不足，需开发更高效且能适应动态场景的算法以支持机器人自主决策。
AI.method: 将气体映射问题建模为依赖局部占用信息的3D高斯势因子图，引入高斯信念传播框架与混合消息调度器加速收敛，并设计动态扩展推理任务以融合连续气体测量与机器人局部空间结构信息。
AI.result: 算法在2D/3D仿真中比传统直接求解器快多个数量级，首次在GPS受限的复杂环境中实现地面机器人实时高分辨率3D气体分布映射，支持复杂气流结构的在线推理。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为机器人提供了超越2D方法的实时环境感知能力，通过实时气体分布估计可优化自主系统的采样路径规划与决策效率。

authors_text: Mo Tiwari,Ryan Kang,Je-Yong Lee,Donghyun Lee,Chris Piech,Sebastian Thrun,Ilan Shomorony,Martin Jinye Zhang
title: Faster Maximum Inner Product Search in High Dimensions
title_zh: 高维中更快的最大内积搜索
abstract: Maximum Inner Product Search (MIPS) is a ubiquitous task in machine learning applications such as recommendation systems. Given a query vector and $n$ atom vectors in $d$-dimensional space, the goal of MIPS is to find the atom that has the highest inner product with the query vector. Existing MIPS algorithms scale at least as $O(\sqrt{d})$, which becomes computationally prohibitive in high-dimensional settings. In this work, we present BanditMIPS, a novel randomized MIPS algorithm whose complexity is independent of $d$. BanditMIPS estimates the inner product for each atom by subsampling coordinates and adaptively evaluates more coordinates for more promising atoms. The specific adaptive sampling strategy is motivated by multi-armed bandits. We provide theoretical guarantees that BanditMIPS returns the correct answer with high probability, while improving the complexity in $d$ from $O(\sqrt{d})$ to $O(1)$. We also perform experiments on four synthetic and real-world datasets and demonstrate that BanditMIPS outperforms prior state-of-the-art algorithms. For example, in the Movie Lens dataset ($n$=4,000, $d$=6,000), BanditMIPS is 20$\times$ faster than the next best algorithm while returning the same answer. BanditMIPS requires no preprocessing of the data and includes a hyperparameter that practitioners may use to trade off accuracy and runtime. We also propose a variant of our algorithm, named BanditMIPS-$α$, which achieves further speedups by employing non-uniform sampling across coordinates. Finally, we demonstrate how known preprocessing techniques can be used to further accelerate BanditMIPS, and discuss applications to Matching Pursuit and Fourier analysis.
summary: Maximum Inner Product Search (MIPS) is a ubiquitous task in machine learning applications such as recommendation systems. Given a query vector and $n$ atom vectors in $d$-dimensional space, the goal of MIPS is to find the atom that has the highest inner product with the query vector. Existing MIPS algorithms scale at least as $O(\sqrt{d})$, which becomes computationally prohibitive in high-dimensional settings. In this work, we present BanditMIPS, a novel randomized MIPS algorithm whose complexity is independent of $d$. BanditMIPS estimates the inner product for each atom by subsampling coordinates and adaptively evaluates more coordinates for more promising atoms. The specific adaptive sampling strategy is motivated by multi-armed bandits. We provide theoretical guarantees that BanditMIPS returns the correct answer with high probability, while improving the complexity in $d$ from $O(\sqrt{d})$ to $O(1)$. We also perform experiments on four synthetic and real-world datasets and demonstrate that BanditMIPS outperforms prior state-of-the-art algorithms. For example, in the Movie Lens dataset ($n$=4,000, $d$=6,000), BanditMIPS is 20$\times$ faster than the next best algorithm while returning the same answer. BanditMIPS requires no preprocessing of the data and includes a hyperparameter that practitioners may use to trade off accuracy and runtime. We also propose a variant of our algorithm, named BanditMIPS-$α$, which achieves further speedups by employing non-uniform sampling across coordinates. Finally, we demonstrate how known preprocessing techniques can be used to further accelerate BanditMIPS, and discuss applications to Matching Pursuit and Fourier analysis.
abstract_zh: 最大内积搜索 (MIPS) 是推荐系统等机器学习应用中普遍存在的任务。给定$d$维空间中的查询向量和$n$个原子向量，MIPS的目标是找到与查询向量具有最高内积的原子。现有的 MIPS 算法的规模至少为 $O(\sqrt{d})$，这在高维设置中在计算上变得令人望而却步。在这项工作中，我们提出了 BanditMIPS，一种新颖的随机 MIPS 算法，其复杂度与 $d$ 无关。 BanditMIPS 通过子采样坐标来估计每个原子的内积，并自适应地评估更有希望的原子的更多坐标。具体的自适应采样策略是由多臂老虎机激发的。我们提供理论上的保证，BanditMIPS 以高概率返回正确答案，同时将 $d$ 的复杂度从 $O(\sqrt{d})$ 提高到 $O(1)$。我们还对四个合成和真实数据集进行了实验，并证明 BanditMIPS 优于先前最先进的算法。例如，在 Movie Lens 数据集（$n$=4,000，$d$=6,000）中，BanditMIPS 比下一个最佳算法快 20$\times$，同时返回相同的答案。 BanditMIPS 不需要对数据进行预处理，并且包含一个超参数，从业者可以使用该超参数来权衡准确性和运行时间。我们还提出了算法的一个变体，名为 BanditMIPS-$α$，它通过跨坐标采用非均匀采样来实现进一步的加速。最后，我们演示如何使用已知的预处理技术来进一步加速 BanditMIPS，并讨论匹配追踪和傅里叶分析的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BanditMIPS的新型随机化算法，用于解决高维空间中的最大内积搜索（MIPS）问题，其时间复杂度与维度无关。
AI.motivation: 现有MIPS算法复杂度至少为O(√d)，在高维场景下计算成本过高，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过坐标子采样和自适应评估策略（受多臂老虎机启发），BanditMIPS动态分配计算资源给更可能产生高内积的原子向量，并提出非均匀采样变体BanditMIPS-α进一步加速。
AI.result: 在四个合成及真实数据集（如Movie Lens）实验中，BanditMIPS相较最优算法提速20倍且保持正确性，无需预处理且支持精度-速度权衡参数调节。
AI.conclusion: BanditMIPS在理论上保证正确性的同时显著降低计算复杂度，其思想可扩展至匹配追踪和傅里叶分析等领域。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BanditMIPS的新型随机化算法，用于解决高维空间中的最大内积搜索（MIPS）问题，其时间复杂度与维度无关。
motivation: 现有MIPS算法复杂度至少为O(√d)，在高维场景下计算成本过高，亟需更高效的解决方案。
method: 通过坐标子采样和自适应评估策略（受多臂老虎机启发），BanditMIPS动态分配计算资源给更可能产生高内积的原子向量，并提出非均匀采样变体BanditMIPS-α进一步加速。
result: 在四个合成及真实数据集（如Movie Lens）实验中，BanditMIPS相较最优算法提速20倍且保持正确性，无需预处理且支持精度-速度权衡参数调节。
conclusion: BanditMIPS在理论上保证正确性的同时显著降低计算复杂度，其思想可扩展至匹配追踪和傅里叶分析等领域。
search_text: Faster Maximum Inner Product Search in High Dimensions 高维中更快的最大内积搜索 Maximum Inner Product Search (MIPS) is a ubiquitous task in machine learning applications such as recommendation systems. Given a query vector and $n$ atom vectors in $d$-dimensional space, the goal of MIPS is to find the atom that has the highest inner product with the query vector. Existing MIPS algorithms scale at least as $O(\sqrt{d})$, which becomes computationally prohibitive in high-dimensional settings. In this work, we present BanditMIPS, a novel randomized MIPS algorithm whose complexity is independent of $d$. BanditMIPS estimates the inner product for each atom by subsampling coordinates and adaptively evaluates more coordinates for more promising atoms. The specific adaptive sampling strategy is motivated by multi-armed bandits. We provide theoretical guarantees that BanditMIPS returns the correct answer with high probability, while improving the complexity in $d$ from $O(\sqrt{d})$ to $O(1)$. We also perform experiments on four synthetic and real-world datasets and demonstrate that BanditMIPS outperforms prior state-of-the-art algorithms. For example, in the Movie Lens dataset ($n$=4,000, $d$=6,000), BanditMIPS is 20$\times$ faster than the next best algorithm while returning the same answer. BanditMIPS requires no preprocessing of the data and includes a hyperparameter that practitioners may use to trade off accuracy and runtime. We also propose a variant of our algorithm, named BanditMIPS-$α$, which achieves further speedups by employing non-uniform sampling across coordinates. Finally, we demonstrate how known preprocessing techniques can be used to further accelerate BanditMIPS, and discuss applications to Matching Pursuit and Fourier analysis. 最大内积搜索 (MIPS) 是推荐系统等机器学习应用中普遍存在的任务。给定$d$维空间中的查询向量和$n$个原子向量，MIPS的目标是找到与查询向量具有最高内积的原子。现有的 MIPS 算法的规模至少为 $O(\sqrt{d})$，这在高维设置中在计算上变得令人望而却步。在这项工作中，我们提出了 BanditMIPS，一种新颖的随机 MIPS 算法，其复杂度与 $d$ 无关。 BanditMIPS 通过子采样坐标来估计每个原子的内积，并自适应地评估更有希望的原子的更多坐标。具体的自适应采样策略是由多臂老虎机激发的。我们提供理论上的保证，BanditMIPS 以高概率返回正确答案，同时将 $d$ 的复杂度从 $O(\sqrt{d})$ 提高到 $O(1)$。我们还对四个合成和真实数据集进行了实验，并证明 BanditMIPS 优于先前最先进的算法。例如，在 Movie Lens 数据集（$n$=4,000，$d$=6,000）中，BanditMIPS 比下一个最佳算法快 20$\times$，同时返回相同的答案。 BanditMIPS 不需要对数据进行预处理，并且包含一个超参数，从业者可以使用该超参数来权衡准确性和运行时间。我们还提出了算法的一个变体，名为 BanditMIPS-$α$，它通过跨坐标采用非均匀采样来实现进一步的加速。最后，我们演示如何使用已知的预处理技术来进一步加速 BanditMIPS，并讨论匹配追踪和傅里叶分析的应用。 本文提出了一种名为BanditMIPS的新型随机化算法，用于解决高维空间中的最大内积搜索（MIPS）问题，其时间复杂度与维度无关。 Mo Tiwari,Ryan Kang,Je-Yong Lee,Donghyun Lee,Chris Piech,Sebastian Thrun,Ilan Shomorony,Martin Jinye Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Fazlourrahman Balouchzahi,Sabur Butt,Grigori Sidorov,Alexander Gelbukh
title: ReDDIT: Regret Detection and Domain Identification from Text
title_zh: ReDDIT：文本中的遗憾检测和域识别
abstract: In this paper, we present a study of regret and its expression on social media platforms. Specifically, we present a novel dataset of Reddit texts that have been classified into three classes: Regret by Action, Regret by Inaction, and No Regret. We then use this dataset to investigate the language used to express regret on Reddit and to identify the domains of text that are most commonly associated with regret. Our findings show that Reddit users are most likely to express regret for past actions, particularly in the domain of relationships. We also found that deep learning models using GloVe embedding outperformed other models in all experiments, indicating the effectiveness of GloVe for representing the meaning and context of words in the domain of regret. Overall, our study provides valuable insights into the nature and prevalence of regret on social media, as well as the potential of deep learning and word embeddings for analyzing and understanding emotional language in online text. These findings have implications for the development of natural language processing algorithms and the design of social media platforms that support emotional expression and communication.
summary: In this paper, we present a study of regret and its expression on social media platforms. Specifically, we present a novel dataset of Reddit texts that have been classified into three classes: Regret by Action, Regret by Inaction, and No Regret. We then use this dataset to investigate the language used to express regret on Reddit and to identify the domains of text that are most commonly associated with regret. Our findings show that Reddit users are most likely to express regret for past actions, particularly in the domain of relationships. We also found that deep learning models using GloVe embedding outperformed other models in all experiments, indicating the effectiveness of GloVe for representing the meaning and context of words in the domain of regret. Overall, our study provides valuable insights into the nature and prevalence of regret on social media, as well as the potential of deep learning and word embeddings for analyzing and understanding emotional language in online text. These findings have implications for the development of natural language processing algorithms and the design of social media platforms that support emotional expression and communication.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一项关于后悔及其在社交媒体平台上表达的研究。具体来说，我们提出了一个新颖的 Reddit 文本数据集，该数据集被分为三类：因行动而后悔、因不行动而后悔和不后悔。然后，我们使用该数据集来研究在 Reddit 上表达遗憾的语言，并识别最常与遗憾相关的文本领域。我们的研究结果表明，Reddit 用户最有可能对过去的行为表示遗憾，尤其是在人际关系领域。我们还发现，在所有实验中，使用 GloVe 嵌入的深度学习模型都优于其他模型，这表明 GloVe 在表示遗憾领域单词的含义和上下文方面的有效性。总的来说，我们的研究为社交媒体上遗憾的性质和普遍性以及深度学习和词嵌入在分析和理解在线文本中的情感语言的潜力提供了宝贵的见解。这些发现对自然语言处理算法的开发以及支持情感表达和交流的社交媒体平台的设计具有影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为ReDDIT的新数据集，用于检测社交媒体中的后悔情绪并识别相关领域，通过分析Reddit文本分类和深度学习模型效果进行研究。
AI.motivation: 研究社交媒体中用户如何表达后悔情绪及其常见领域，探索深度学习模型在情感分析中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 构建包含三类（行动后悔、不作为后悔、无后悔）的Reddit文本数据集，采用基于GloVe嵌入的深度学习模型进行分类实验，并分析语言特征与领域关联性。
AI.result: 发现用户最常因过去行动（尤其是人际关系领域）表达后悔，GloVe模型在所有实验中表现最佳，证明其在情感语境建模中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了社交媒体中后悔情绪的特征与分布规律，验证了词嵌入技术对情感语言分析的价值，为NLP算法优化和社交平台设计提供参考。

authors_text: Valentin Hofmann,Janet B. Pierrehumbert,Hinrich Schütze
title: Unsupervised Detection of Contextualized Embedding Bias with Application to Ideology
title_zh: 情境化嵌入偏差的无监督检测及其在意识形态中的应用
abstract: We propose a fully unsupervised method to detect bias in contextualized embeddings. The method leverages the assortative information latently encoded by social networks and combines orthogonality regularization, structured sparsity learning, and graph neural networks to find the embedding subspace capturing this information. As a concrete example, we focus on the phenomenon of ideological bias: we introduce the concept of an ideological subspace, show how it can be found by applying our method to online discussion forums, and present techniques to probe it. Our experiments suggest that the ideological subspace encodes abstract evaluative semantics and reflects changes in the political left-right spectrum during the presidency of Donald Trump.
summary: We propose a fully unsupervised method to detect bias in contextualized embeddings. The method leverages the assortative information latently encoded by social networks and combines orthogonality regularization, structured sparsity learning, and graph neural networks to find the embedding subspace capturing this information. As a concrete example, we focus on the phenomenon of ideological bias: we introduce the concept of an ideological subspace, show how it can be found by applying our method to online discussion forums, and present techniques to probe it. Our experiments suggest that the ideological subspace encodes abstract evaluative semantics and reflects changes in the political left-right spectrum during the presidency of Donald Trump.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种完全无监督的方法来检测上下文嵌入中的偏差。该方法利用社交网络潜在编码的分类信息，并结合正交正则化、结构化稀疏学习和图神经网络来找到捕获该信息的嵌入子空间。作为一个具体的例子，我们关注意识形态偏见的现象：我们引入意识形态子空间的概念，展示如何通过将我们的方法应用于在线讨论论坛来找到它，并提出探测它的技术。我们的实验表明，意识形态子空间编码了抽象的评价语义，并反映了唐纳德·特朗普总统任期内政治左右派的变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督方法检测上下文嵌入偏差，并应用于意识形态分析，通过社交网络隐含信息和图神经网络等技术构建意识形态子空间。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效检测嵌入模型中的隐含偏差，尤其在意识形态等复杂社会语义领域缺乏无监督解决方案。
AI.method: 结合社交网络的 assortative 信息、正交正则化、结构稀疏学习与图神经网络，从嵌入空间中提取意识形态子空间。
AI.result: 实验表明该子空间能编码抽象评价语义，并反映特朗普任期内政治光谱的动态变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效揭示嵌入模型中的意识形态偏差，为分析社会语义动态提供了新视角。

Our experiments suggest that the ideological subspace encodes abstract evaluative semantics and reflects changes in the political left-right spectrum during the presidency of Donald Trump. 我们提出了一种完全无监督的方法来检测上下文嵌入中的偏差。该方法利用社交网络潜在编码的分类信息，并结合正交正则化、结构化稀疏学习和图神经网络来找到捕获该信息的嵌入子空间。作为一个具体的例子，我们关注意识形态偏见的现象：我们引入意识形态子空间的概念，展示如何通过将我们的方法应用于在线讨论论坛来找到它，并提出探测它的技术。我们的实验表明，意识形态子空间编码了抽象的评价语义，并反映了唐纳德·特朗普总统任期内政治左右派的变化。 本文提出一种无监督方法检测上下文嵌入偏差，并应用于意识形态分析，通过社交网络隐含信息和图神经网络等技术构建意识形态子空间。 Valentin Hofmann,Janet B. Pierrehumbert,Hinrich Schütze cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.SI

authors_text: Florian Wimmenauer,Matúš Mihalák,Mark H. M. Winands
title: Monte-Carlo Tree-Search for Leveraging Performance of Blackbox Job-Shop Scheduling Heuristics
title_zh: 利用黑盒作业车间调度启发式性能的蒙特卡罗树搜索
abstract: In manufacturing, the production is often done on out-of-the-shelf manufacturing lines, whose underlying scheduling heuristics are not known due to the intellectual property. We consider such a setting with a black-box job-shop system and an unknown scheduling heuristic that, for a given permutation of jobs, schedules the jobs for the black-box job-shop with the goal of minimizing the makespan. Here, the jobs need to enter the job-shop in the given order of the permutation, but may take different paths within the job shop, which depends on the black-box heuristic. The performance of the black-box heuristic depends on the order of the jobs, and the natural problem for the manufacturer is to find an optimum ordering of the jobs. Facing a real-world scenario as described above, we engineer the Monte-Carlo tree-search for finding a close-to-optimum ordering of jobs. To cope with a large solutions-space in planning scenarios, a hierarchical Monte-Carlo tree search (H-MCTS) is proposed based on abstraction of jobs. On synthetic and real-life problems, H-MCTS with integrated abstraction significantly outperforms pure heuristic-based techniques as well as other Monte-Carlo search variants. We furthermore show that, by modifying the evaluation metric in H-MCTS, it is possible to achieve other optimization objectives than what the scheduling heuristics are designed for -- e.g., minimizing the total completion time instead of the makespan. Our experimental observations have been also validated in real-life cases, and our H-MCTS approach has been implemented in a production plant's controller.
summary: In manufacturing, the production is often done on out-of-the-shelf manufacturing lines, whose underlying scheduling heuristics are not known due to the intellectual property. We consider such a setting with a black-box job-shop system and an unknown scheduling heuristic that, for a given permutation of jobs, schedules the jobs for the black-box job-shop with the goal of minimizing the makespan. Here, the jobs need to enter the job-shop in the given order of the permutation, but may take different paths within the job shop, which depends on the black-box heuristic. The performance of the black-box heuristic depends on the order of the jobs, and the natural problem for the manufacturer is to find an optimum ordering of the jobs. Facing a real-world scenario as described above, we engineer the Monte-Carlo tree-search for finding a close-to-optimum ordering of jobs. To cope with a large solutions-space in planning scenarios, a hierarchical Monte-Carlo tree search (H-MCTS) is proposed based on abstraction of jobs. On synthetic and real-life problems, H-MCTS with integrated abstraction significantly outperforms pure heuristic-based techniques as well as other Monte-Carlo search variants. We furthermore show that, by modifying the evaluation metric in H-MCTS, it is possible to achieve other optimization objectives than what the scheduling heuristics are designed for -- e.g., minimizing the total completion time instead of the makespan. Our experimental observations have been also validated in real-life cases, and our H-MCTS approach has been implemented in a production plant's controller.
abstract_zh: 在制造业中，生产通常是在现成的生产线上完成的，由于知识产权的原因，其基本的调度启发式方法并不为人所知。我们考虑这样一种设置，具有黑盒作业车间系统和未知的调度启发式，对于给定的作业排列，为黑盒作业车间调度作业，目标是最小化完工时间。在这里，作业需要按照给定的排列顺序进入作业车间，但在作业车间内可能采取不同的路径，这取决于黑盒启发式。黑盒启发式的性能取决于作业的顺序，制造商的自然问题是找到作业的最佳顺序。面对如上所述的现实场景，我们设计了蒙特卡罗树搜索来寻找接近最佳的作业排序。为了应对规划场景中的大解决方案空间，基于作业抽象提出了分层蒙特卡罗树搜索（H-MCTS）。在合成和现实生活问题上，具有集成抽象的 H-MCTS 显着优于纯粹的基于启发式的技术以及其他蒙特卡罗搜索变体。我们还表明，通过修改 H-MCTS 中的评估指标，可以实现调度启发式设计之外的其他优化目标，例如，最小化总完成时间而不是完工时间。我们的实验观察结果也在现实案例中得到了验证，并且我们的 H-MCTS 方法已在生产工厂的控制器中实施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层蒙特卡洛树搜索（H-MCTS）的方法，用于在黑盒作业车间调度系统中寻找接近最优的作业顺序，以最小化完工时间。
AI.motivation: 在制造业中，现有生产系统通常使用专有调度启发式算法，其内部逻辑不可见。制造商需在未知调度规则下优化作业顺序，但传统启发式方法难以应对复杂场景。
AI.method: 设计分层蒙特卡洛树搜索（H-MCTS），通过作业抽象降低搜索空间复杂度，并引入可调整的评估指标以支持多目标优化（如总完成时间而非仅完工时间）。
AI.result: H-MCTS在合成数据和实际生产案例中显著优于纯启发式方法及其他MCTS变体，且通过修改评估指标实现了额外优化目标，已成功部署于实际生产控制器中。
AI.conclusion: H-MCTS为黑盒调度系统提供了有效的优化框架，在保持实际应用可行性的同时扩展了调度目标的灵活性，验证了其工业价值。

authors_text: Md Masudur Rahman,Yexiang Xue
title: Robust Policy Optimization in Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习中的鲁棒策略优化
abstract: The policy gradient method enjoys the simplicity of the objective where the agent optimizes the cumulative reward directly. Moreover, in the continuous action domain, parameterized distribution of action distribution allows easy control of exploration, resulting from the variance of the representing distribution. Entropy can play an essential role in policy optimization by selecting the stochastic policy, which eventually helps better explore the environment in reinforcement learning (RL). However, the stochasticity often reduces as the training progresses; thus, the policy becomes less exploratory. Additionally, certain parametric distributions might only work for some environments and require extensive hyperparameter tuning. This paper aims to mitigate these issues. In particular, we propose an algorithm called Robust Policy Optimization (RPO), which leverages a perturbed distribution. We hypothesize that our method encourages high-entropy actions and provides a way to represent the action space better. We further provide empirical evidence to verify our hypothesis. We evaluated our methods on various continuous control tasks from DeepMind Control, OpenAI Gym, Pybullet, and IsaacGym. We observed that in many settings, RPO increases the policy entropy early in training and then maintains a certain level of entropy throughout the training period. Eventually, our agent RPO shows consistently improved performance compared to PPO and other techniques: entropy regularization, different distributions, and data augmentation. Furthermore, in several settings, our method stays robust in performance, while other baseline mechanisms fail to improve and even worsen the performance.
summary: The policy gradient method enjoys the simplicity of the objective where the agent optimizes the cumulative reward directly. Moreover, in the continuous action domain, parameterized distribution of action distribution allows easy control of exploration, resulting from the variance of the representing distribution. Entropy can play an essential role in policy optimization by selecting the stochastic policy, which eventually helps better explore the environment in reinforcement learning (RL). However, the stochasticity often reduces as the training progresses; thus, the policy becomes less exploratory. Additionally, certain parametric distributions might only work for some environments and require extensive hyperparameter tuning. This paper aims to mitigate these issues. In particular, we propose an algorithm called Robust Policy Optimization (RPO), which leverages a perturbed distribution. We hypothesize that our method encourages high-entropy actions and provides a way to represent the action space better. We further provide empirical evidence to verify our hypothesis. We evaluated our methods on various continuous control tasks from DeepMind Control, OpenAI Gym, Pybullet, and IsaacGym. We observed that in many settings, RPO increases the policy entropy early in training and then maintains a certain level of entropy throughout the training period. Eventually, our agent RPO shows consistently improved performance compared to PPO and other techniques: entropy regularization, different distributions, and data augmentation. Furthermore, in several settings, our method stays robust in performance, while other baseline mechanisms fail to improve and even worsen the performance.
abstract_zh: 策略梯度方法的目标简单，代理直接优化累积奖励。此外，在连续动作域中，动作分布的参数化分布可以轻松控制由表示分布的方差产生的探索。熵可以通过选择随机策略在策略优化中发挥重要作用，最终有助于更好地探索强化学习（RL）中的环境。然而，随着训练的进行，随机性往往会降低；因此，该政策的探索性就减弱了。此外，某些参数分布可能仅适用于某些环境，并且需要大量的超参数调整。本文旨在缓解这些问题。特别是，我们提出了一种称为鲁棒策略优化（RPO）的算法，它利用扰动分布。我们假设我们的方法鼓励高熵动作，并提供一种更好地表示动作空间的方法。我们进一步提供经验证据来验证我们的假设。我们在 DeepMind Control、OpenAI Gym、Pybullet 和 IsaacGym 的各种连续控制任务上评估了我们的方法。我们观察到，在许多设置中，RPO 在训练早期增加策略熵，然后在整个训练期间保持一定水平的熵。最终，与 PPO 和其他技术相比，我们的代理 RPO 显示出持续改进的性能：熵正则化、不同分布和数据增强。此外，在多种设置中，我们的方法在性能上保持稳健，而其他基线机制无法提高甚至恶化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RPO的鲁棒策略优化算法，旨在解决深度强化学习中策略探索不足和超参数敏感性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有策略梯度方法在训练过程中探索性随时间减弱，且参数化分布对特定环境依赖性强，需大量超参数调优。
AI.method: 通过引入扰动分布机制，提出RPO算法以维持策略熵值，增强动作空间表示能力并提升探索效率。
AI.result: 在多个连续控制任务中，RPO在训练初期显著提升策略熵值并保持稳定，性能优于PPO、熵正则化等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: RPO通过扰动分布有效平衡探索与利用，在多种场景下展现鲁棒性，为深度强化学习提供新的优化方向。

Furthermore, in several settings, our method stays robust in performance, while other baseline mechanisms fail to improve and even worsen the performance. 策略梯度方法的目标简单，代理直接优化累积奖励。此外，在连续动作域中，动作分布的参数化分布可以轻松控制由表示分布的方差产生的探索。熵可以通过选择随机策略在策略优化中发挥重要作用，最终有助于更好地探索强化学习（RL）中的环境。然而，随着训练的进行，随机性往往会降低；因此，该政策的探索性就减弱了。此外，某些参数分布可能仅适用于某些环境，并且需要大量的超参数调整。本文旨在缓解这些问题。特别是，我们提出了一种称为鲁棒策略优化（RPO）的算法，它利用扰动分布。我们假设我们的方法鼓励高熵动作，并提供一种更好地表示动作空间的方法。我们进一步提供经验证据来验证我们的假设。我们在 DeepMind Control、OpenAI Gym、Pybullet 和 IsaacGym 的各种连续控制任务上评估了我们的方法。我们观察到，在许多设置中，RPO 在训练早期增加策略熵，然后在整个训练期间保持一定水平的熵。最终，与 PPO 和其他技术相比，我们的代理 RPO 显示出持续改进的性能：熵正则化、不同分布和数据增强。此外，在多种设置中，我们的方法在性能上保持稳健，而其他基线机制无法提高甚至恶化性能。 本文提出了一种名为RPO的鲁棒策略优化算法，旨在解决深度强化学习中策略探索不足和超参数敏感性问题。 Md Masudur Rahman,Yexiang Xue cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Aleksander Figiel,Tomohiro Koana,André Nichterlein,Niklas Wünsche
title: Correlating Theory and Practice in Finding Clubs and Plexes
title_zh: 寻找俱乐部和丛时的理论与实践的关联
abstract: Finding large "cliquish" subgraphs is a classic NP-hard graph problem. In this work, we focus on finding maximum $s$-clubs and $s$-plexes, i.e., graphs of diameter $s$ and graphs where each vertex is adjacent to all but $s$ vertices. Preprocessing based on Turing kernelization is a standard tool to tackle these problems, especially on sparse graphs. We provide a new parameterized analysis for the Turing kernelization and demonstrate their usefulness in practice. Moreover, we provide evidence that the new theoretical bounds indeed better explain the observed running times than the existing theoretical running time bounds. To this end, we suggest a general method to compare how well theoretical running time bounds fit to measured running times.
summary: Finding large "cliquish" subgraphs is a classic NP-hard graph problem. In this work, we focus on finding maximum $s$-clubs and $s$-plexes, i.e., graphs of diameter $s$ and graphs where each vertex is adjacent to all but $s$ vertices. Preprocessing based on Turing kernelization is a standard tool to tackle these problems, especially on sparse graphs. We provide a new parameterized analysis for the Turing kernelization and demonstrate their usefulness in practice. Moreover, we provide evidence that the new theoretical bounds indeed better explain the observed running times than the existing theoretical running time bounds. To this end, we suggest a general method to compare how well theoretical running time bounds fit to measured running times.
abstract_zh: 寻找大的“小集团”子图是一个经典的 NP 难图问题。在这项工作中，我们专注于寻找最大的 $s$-clubs 和 $s$-plexes，即直径为 $s$ 的图以及每个顶点与除 $s$ 之外的所有顶点相邻的图。基于图灵核化的预处理是解决这些问题的标准工具，特别是在稀疏图上。我们为图灵核化提供了一种新的参数化分析，并证明了它们在实践中的有用性。此外，我们提供的证据表明，新的理论界限确实比现有的理论运行时间界限更好地解释了观察到的运行时间。为此，我们建议使用一种通用方法来比较理论运行时间范围与测量运行时间的拟合程度。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过理论分析与实际实验结合，改进寻找s-club和s-plex的算法预处理方法，并验证新理论界限的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有理论运行时间界限无法准确解释实际算法表现，需通过改进理论分析和实验验证来弥补这一差距。
AI.method: 采用图灵核化预处理方法，结合参数化分析，提出新理论界限，并设计比较理论与实际运行时间的实验方法。
AI.result: 新理论界限更准确地解释了实际运行时间，实验验证了其有效性，并提供了更优的算法预处理方法。
AI.conclusion: 新理论分析有效连接了算法理论与实践，为NP难问题的求解提供了更优的预处理策略和理论支持。

authors_text: Uri Shaham,Maha Elbayad,Vedanuj Goswami,Omer Levy,Shruti Bhosale
title: Causes and Cures for Interference in Multilingual Translation
title_zh: 多语言翻译干扰的原因及解决方法
abstract: Multilingual machine translation models can benefit from synergy between different language pairs, but also suffer from interference. While there is a growing number of sophisticated methods that aim to eliminate interference, our understanding of interference as a phenomenon is still limited. This work identifies the main factors that contribute to interference in multilingual machine translation. Through systematic experimentation, we find that interference (or synergy) are primarily determined by model size, data size, and the proportion of each language pair within the total dataset. We observe that substantial interference occurs mainly when the model is very small with respect to the available training data, and that using standard transformer configurations with less than one billion parameters largely alleviates interference and promotes synergy. Moreover, we show that tuning the sampling temperature to control the proportion of each language pair in the data is key to balancing the amount of interference between low and high resource language pairs effectively, and can lead to superior performance overall.
summary: Multilingual machine translation models can benefit from synergy between different language pairs, but also suffer from interference. While there is a growing number of sophisticated methods that aim to eliminate interference, our understanding of interference as a phenomenon is still limited. This work identifies the main factors that contribute to interference in multilingual machine translation. Through systematic experimentation, we find that interference (or synergy) are primarily determined by model size, data size, and the proportion of each language pair within the total dataset. We observe that substantial interference occurs mainly when the model is very small with respect to the available training data, and that using standard transformer configurations with less than one billion parameters largely alleviates interference and promotes synergy. Moreover, we show that tuning the sampling temperature to control the proportion of each language pair in the data is key to balancing the amount of interference between low and high resource language pairs effectively, and can lead to superior performance overall.
abstract_zh: 多语言机器翻译模型可以受益于不同语言对之间的协同，但也会受到干扰。尽管越来越多的复杂方法旨在消除干扰，但我们对干扰现象的理解仍然有限。这项工作确定了导致多语言机器翻译干扰的主要因素。通过系统的实验，我们发现干扰（或协同）主要由模型大小、数据大小以及每个语言对在总数据集中的比例决定。我们观察到，大量干扰主要发生在模型相对于可用训练数据非常小时，并且使用参数少于 10 亿个标准变压器配置可以很大程度上减轻干扰并促进协同作用。此外，我们表明，调整采样温度以控制数据中每个语言对的比例是有效平衡低资源语言对和高资源语言对之间的干扰量的关键，并且可以带来优异的整体性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多语言机器翻译中干扰现象的成因及解决方法，通过实验分析模型规模、数据量及语言对比例等因素对干扰的影响，并提出调控采样温度以优化性能的方案。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有多种消除干扰的方法，但学界对多语言翻译中干扰现象的本质理解仍不足，需系统性探究其成因并寻找有效缓解策略。
AI.method: 通过系统实验，改变模型规模、训练数据量及语言对分布比例，观察干扰与协同效应的变化，并调整采样温度控制数据分布以平衡不同资源语言对的干扰程度。
AI.result: 发现干扰主要由模型规模过小、数据量不足及语言对比例失衡导致；使用超10亿参数的Transformer模型可显著减少干扰，而调整采样温度能有效平衡高低资源语言对的干扰，提升整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过合理控制模型规模与数据采样策略，可有效缓解多语言翻译中的干扰问题，促进不同语言对间的协同效应，从而提升翻译质量。

authors_text: Pappu Kumar Yadav,J. Alex Thomasson,Robert G. Hardin,Stephen W. Searcy,Ulisses Braga-Neto,Sorin C. Popescu,Roberto Rodriguez,Daniel E Martin,Juan Enciso,Karem Meza,Emma L. White
title: Plastic Contaminant Detection in Aerial Imagery of Cotton Fields with Deep Learning
title_zh: 利用深度学习对棉田航空图像中的塑料污染物进行检测
abstract: Plastic shopping bags that get carried away from the side of roads and tangled on cotton plants can end up at cotton gins if not removed before the harvest. Such bags may not only cause problem in the ginning process but might also get embodied in cotton fibers reducing its quality and marketable value. Therefore, it is required to detect, locate, and remove the bags before cotton is harvested. Manually detecting and locating these bags in cotton fields is labor intensive, time-consuming and a costly process. To solve these challenges, we present application of four variants of YOLOv5 (YOLOv5s, YOLOv5m, YOLOv5l and YOLOv5x) for detecting plastic shopping bags using Unmanned Aircraft Systems (UAS)-acquired RGB (Red, Green, and Blue) images. We also show fixed effect model tests of color of plastic bags as well as YOLOv5-variant on average precision (AP), mean average precision (mAP@50) and accuracy. In addition, we also demonstrate the effect of height of plastic bags on the detection accuracy. It was found that color of bags had significant effect (p < 0.001) on accuracy across all the four variants while it did not show any significant effect on the AP with YOLOv5m (p = 0.10) and YOLOv5x (p = 0.35) at 95% confidence level. Similarly, YOLOv5-variant did not show any significant effect on the AP (p = 0.11) and accuracy (p = 0.73) of white bags, but it had significant effects on the AP (p = 0.03) and accuracy (p = 0.02) of brown bags including on the mAP@50 (p = 0.01) and inference speed (p < 0.0001). Additionally, height of plastic bags had significant effect (p < 0.0001) on overall detection accuracy. The findings reported in this paper can be useful in speeding up removal of plastic bags from cotton fields before harvest and thereby reducing the amount of contaminants that end up at cotton gins.

Additionally, height of plastic bags had significant effect (p < 0.0001) on overall detection accuracy. The findings reported in this paper can be useful in speeding up removal of plastic bags from cotton fields before harvest and thereby reducing the amount of contaminants that end up at cotton gins.
abstract_zh: 从路边带走并缠在棉花植株上的塑料购物袋，如果在收获前不清除，最终可能会被送到轧花机。此类袋子不仅可能在轧花过程中造成问题，还可能会渗入棉纤维中，降低其质量和市场价值。因此，需要在棉花采收前对袋子进行检测、定位和清除。在棉田中手动检测和定位这些袋子是一项劳动密集型、耗时且成本高昂的过程。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了 YOLOv5 的四种变体（YOLOv5s、YOLOv5m、YOLOv5l 和 YOLOv5x）的应用，用于使用无人机系统 (UAS) 采集的 RGB（红、绿和蓝）图像来检测塑料购物袋。我们还展示了塑料袋颜色的固定效应模型测试以及 YOLOv5 变体的平均精度 (AP)、平均精度 (mAP@50) 和准确度。此外，我们还论证了塑料袋高度对检测精度的影响。结果发现，袋子的颜色对所有四种变体的准确度都有显着影响 (p < 0.001)，而在 95% 置信水平下，它对 YOLOv5m (p = 0.10) 和 YOLOv5x (p = 0.35) 的 AP 没有显示出任何显着影响。同样，YOLOv5 变体对白色袋的 AP (p = 0.11) 和准确性 (p = 0.73) 没有表现出任何显着影响，但对棕色袋的 AP (p = 0.03) 和准确性 (p = 0.02) 有显着影响，包括 mAP@50 (p = 0.01) 和推理速度 (p < 0.0001)。此外，塑料袋的高度对整体检测精度有显着影响（p < 0.0001）。本文报告的研究结果有助于加快收获前从棉田中清除塑料袋的速度，从而减少最终进入轧棉机的污染物量。

AI.tldr: 本文利用深度学习方法检测棉花田中塑料袋污染，使用YOLOv5模型和无人机获取的RGB图像进行分析。
AI.motivation: 塑料袋混入棉花会影响加工质量和市场价值，人工检测效率低且成本高，需开发自动化检测方法。
AI.method: 采用四种YOLOv5模型变体（YOLOv5s/m/l/x）处理无人机拍摄的RGB图像，并通过固定效应模型分析塑料袋颜色和高度对检测精度的影响。
AI.result: 塑料袋颜色显著影响检测准确率（p<0.001），棕色袋对AP和准确率影响显著（p<0.05），高度也显著影响整体准确率（p<0.0001）。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果可提升棉花收获前塑料袋的自动化清除效率，减少棉花加工厂的污染物残留。

search_text: Plastic Contaminant Detection in Aerial Imagery of Cotton Fields with Deep Learning 利用深度学习对棉田航空图像中的塑料污染物进行检测 Plastic shopping bags that get carried away from the side of roads and tangled on cotton plants can end up at cotton gins if not removed before the harvest. Such bags may not only cause problem in the ginning process but might also get embodied in cotton fibers reducing its quality and marketable value. Therefore, it is required to detect, locate, and remove the bags before cotton is harvested. Manually detecting and locating these bags in cotton fields is labor intensive, time-consuming and a costly process. To solve these challenges, we present application of four variants of YOLOv5 (YOLOv5s, YOLOv5m, YOLOv5l and YOLOv5x) for detecting plastic shopping bags using Unmanned Aircraft Systems (UAS)-acquired RGB (Red, Green, and Blue) images. We also show fixed effect model tests of color of plastic bags as well as YOLOv5-variant on average precision (AP), mean average precision (mAP@50) and accuracy. In addition, we also demonstrate the effect of height of plastic bags on the detection accuracy. It was found that color of bags had significant effect (p < 0.001) on accuracy across all the four variants while it did not show any significant effect on the AP with YOLOv5m (p = 0.10) and YOLOv5x (p = 0.35) at 95% confidence level. Similarly, YOLOv5-variant did not show any significant effect on the AP (p = 0.11) and accuracy (p = 0.73) of white bags, but it had significant effects on the AP (p = 0.03) and accuracy (p = 0.02) of brown bags including on the mAP@50 (p = 0.01) and inference speed (p < 0.0001). Additionally, height of plastic bags had significant effect (p < 0.0001) on overall detection accuracy. The findings reported in this paper can be useful in speeding up removal of plastic bags from cotton fields before harvest and thereby reducing the amount of contaminants that end up at cotton gins. 从路边带走并缠在棉花植株上的塑料购物袋，如果在收获前不清除，最终可能会被送到轧花机。此类袋子不仅可能在轧花过程中造成问题，还可能会渗入棉纤维中，降低其质量和市场价值。因此，需要在棉花采收前对袋子进行检测、定位和清除。在棉田中手动检测和定位这些袋子是一项劳动密集型、耗时且成本高昂的过程。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了 YOLOv5 的四种变体（YOLOv5s、YOLOv5m、YOLOv5l 和 YOLOv5x）的应用，用于使用无人机系统 (UAS) 采集的 RGB（红、绿和蓝）图像来检测塑料购物袋。我们还展示了塑料袋颜色的固定效应模型测试以及 YOLOv5 变体的平均精度 (AP)、平均精度 (mAP@50) 和准确度。此外，我们还论证了塑料袋高度对检测精度的影响。结果发现，袋子的颜色对所有四种变体的准确度都有显着影响 (p < 0.001)，而在 95% 置信水平下，它对 YOLOv5m (p = 0.10) 和 YOLOv5x (p = 0.35) 的 AP 没有显示出任何显着影响。同样，YOLOv5 变体对白色袋的 AP (p = 0.11) 和准确性 (p = 0.73) 没有表现出任何显着影响，但对棕色袋的 AP (p = 0.03) 和准确性 (p = 0.02) 有显着影响，包括 mAP@50 (p = 0.01) 和推理速度 (p < 0.0001)。此外，塑料袋的高度对整体检测精度有显着影响（p < 0.0001）。本文报告的研究结果有助于加快收获前从棉田中清除塑料袋的速度，从而减少最终进入轧棉机的污染物量。 本文利用深度学习方法检测棉花田中塑料袋污染，使用YOLOv5模型和无人机获取的RGB图像进行分析。 Pappu Kumar Yadav,J. Alex Thomasson,Robert G. Hardin,Stephen W. Searcy,Ulisses Braga-Neto,Sorin C. Popescu,Roberto Rodriguez,Daniel E Martin,Juan Enciso,Karem Meza,Emma L. White cs.CV

authors_text: Alexei Baevski,Arun Babu,Wei-Ning Hsu,Michael Auli
title: Efficient Self-supervised Learning with Contextualized Target Representations for Vision, Speech and Language
title_zh: 通过视觉、语音和语言的情境化目标表示进行高效的自我监督学习
abstract: Current self-supervised learning algorithms are often modality-specific and require large amounts of computational resources. To address these issues, we increase the training efficiency of data2vec, a learning objective that generalizes across several modalities. We do not encode masked tokens, use a fast convolutional decoder and amortize the effort to build teacher representations. data2vec 2.0 benefits from the rich contextualized target representations introduced in data2vec which enable a fast self-supervised learner. Experiments on ImageNet-1K image classification show that data2vec 2.0 matches the accuracy of Masked Autoencoders in 16.4x lower pre-training time, on Librispeech speech recognition it performs as well as wav2vec 2.0 in 10.6x less time, and on GLUE natural language understanding it matches a retrained RoBERTa model in half the time. Trading some speed for accuracy results in ImageNet-1K top-1 accuracy of 86.8\% with a ViT-L model trained for 150 epochs.
summary: Current self-supervised learning algorithms are often modality-specific and require large amounts of computational resources. To address these issues, we increase the training efficiency of data2vec, a learning objective that generalizes across several modalities. We do not encode masked tokens, use a fast convolutional decoder and amortize the effort to build teacher representations. data2vec 2.0 benefits from the rich contextualized target representations introduced in data2vec which enable a fast self-supervised learner. Experiments on ImageNet-1K image classification show that data2vec 2.0 matches the accuracy of Masked Autoencoders in 16.4x lower pre-training time, on Librispeech speech recognition it performs as well as wav2vec 2.0 in 10.6x less time, and on GLUE natural language understanding it matches a retrained RoBERTa model in half the time. Trading some speed for accuracy results in ImageNet-1K top-1 accuracy of 86.8\% with a ViT-L model trained for 150 epochs.
abstract_zh: 当前的自监督学习算法通常是特定于模态的，并且需要大量的计算资源。为了解决这些问题，我们提高了 data2vec 的训练效率，这是一个泛化多种模式的学习目标。我们不编码屏蔽标记，使用快速卷积解码器并分摊构建教师表示的工作量。 data2vec 2.0 受益于 data2vec 中引入的丰富的上下文目标表示，这使得快速的自我监督学习器成为可能。 ImageNet-1K 图像分类实验表明，data2vec 2.0 在预训练时间缩短了 16.4 倍的情况下与 Masked Autoencoder 的准确性相匹配；在 Librispeech 语音识别上，它的性能与 wav2vec 2.0 一样，所需时间缩短了 10.6 倍；在 GLUE 自然语言理解上，它与重新训练的 RoBERTa 模型相匹配的时间缩短了一半。用一些速度换取准确性，使用训练了 150 个 epoch 的 ViT-L 模型，ImageNet-1K top-1 的准确率达到 86.8%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的跨模态自监督学习方法data2vec 2.0，通过优化目标表示和训练流程提升视觉、语音和语言任务的训练效率。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习算法模态特定且计算成本高，需开发通用且高效的跨模态学习框架以降低资源消耗。
AI.method: 改进data2vec框架：移除掩码标记编码、采用快速卷积解码器、摊销教师表示构建，利用上下文化目标表示加速训练。
AI.result: ImageNet-1K分类准确率86.8%（ViT-L, 150 epoch），预训练时间比Masked Autoencoder快16.4倍；Librispeech任务比wav2vec 2.0快10.6倍；GLUE任务仅需RoBERTa一半时间。
AI.conclusion: data2vec 2.0通过架构优化显著提升跨模态自监督学习效率，在保持性能的同时大幅减少训练时间，为多模态预训练提供新范式。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种高效的跨模态自监督学习方法data2vec 2.0，通过优化目标表示和训练流程提升视觉、语音和语言任务的训练效率。

authors_text: Mario Alviano,Laura Giordano,Daniele Theseider Dupré
title: Many-valued Argumentation, Conditionals and a Probabilistic Semantics for Gradual Argumentation
title_zh: 多值论证、条件和渐进论证的概率语义
abstract: In this paper we propose a general approach to define a many-valued preferential interpretation of gradual argumentation semantics. The approach allows for conditional reasoning over arguments and boolean combination of arguments, with respect to a class of gradual semantics, through the verification of graded (strict or defeasible) implications over a preferential interpretation. As a proof of concept, in the finitely-valued case, an Answer set Programming approach is proposed for conditional reasoning in a many-valued argumentation semantics of weighted argumentation graphs. The paper also develops and discusses a probabilistic semantics for gradual argumentation, which builds on the many-valued conditional semantics.
summary: In this paper we propose a general approach to define a many-valued preferential interpretation of gradual argumentation semantics. The approach allows for conditional reasoning over arguments and boolean combination of arguments, with respect to a class of gradual semantics, through the verification of graded (strict or defeasible) implications over a preferential interpretation. As a proof of concept, in the finitely-valued case, an Answer set Programming approach is proposed for conditional reasoning in a many-valued argumentation semantics of weighted argumentation graphs. The paper also develops and discusses a probabilistic semantics for gradual argumentation, which builds on the many-valued conditional semantics.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种通用方法来定义渐进论证语义的多值优先解释。该方法允许通过验证优先解释的分级（严格或可废止）含义，针对一类渐进语义对参数和参数的布尔组合进行条件推理。作为概念证明，在有限值情况下，提出了一种答案集编程方法，用于加权论证图的多值论证语义中的条件推理。本文还开发并讨论了一种基于多值条件语义的渐进论证概率语义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多值优先解释框架和概率语义，用于处理渐进论证中的条件推理与不确定性。
AI.motivation: 现有论证框架难以有效处理模糊性、渐进性及概率性推理需求，需更灵活的语义模型支持复杂论证分析。
AI.method: 基于多值逻辑构建优先解释，结合分级蕴含验证条件推理；在有限值场景下采用答案集编程实现，并扩展概率语义以支持渐进论证。
AI.result: 建立了多值条件推理机制与概率语义模型，验证了其在加权论证图中的可行性，为渐进论证提供了新分析工具。
AI.conclusion: 该框架统一了多值论证与概率推理，为处理复杂不确定性论证问题提供了理论基础与方法支持。

search_text: Many-valued Argumentation, Conditionals and a Probabilistic Semantics for Gradual Argumentation 多值论证、条件和渐进论证的概率语义 In this paper we propose a general approach to define a many-valued preferential interpretation of gradual argumentation semantics. The approach allows for conditional reasoning over arguments and boolean combination of arguments, with respect to a class of gradual semantics, through the verification of graded (strict or defeasible) implications over a preferential interpretation. As a proof of concept, in the finitely-valued case, an Answer set Programming approach is proposed for conditional reasoning in a many-valued argumentation semantics of weighted argumentation graphs. The paper also develops and discusses a probabilistic semantics for gradual argumentation, which builds on the many-valued conditional semantics. 在本文中，我们提出了一种通用方法来定义渐进论证语义的多值优先解释。该方法允许通过验证优先解释的分级（严格或可废止）含义，针对一类渐进语义对参数和参数的布尔组合进行条件推理。作为概念证明，在有限值情况下，提出了一种答案集编程方法，用于加权论证图的多值论证语义中的条件推理。本文还开发并讨论了一种基于多值条件语义的渐进论证概率语义。 本文提出一种多值优先解释框架和概率语义，用于处理渐进论证中的条件推理与不确定性。 Mario Alviano,Laura Giordano,Daniele Theseider Dupré cs.AI

authors_text: Viktor Sanca,Anastasia Ailamaki
title: Analytical Engines With Context-Rich Processing: Towards Efficient Next-Generation Analytics
title_zh: 具有丰富上下文处理能力的分析引擎：迈向高效的下一代分析
abstract: As modern data pipelines continue to collect, produce, and store a variety of data formats, extracting and combining value from traditional and context-rich sources such as strings, text, video, audio, and logs becomes a manual process where such formats are unsuitable for RDBMS. To tap into the dark data, domain experts analyze and extract insights and integrate them into the data repositories. This process can involve out-of-DBMS, ad-hoc analysis, and processing resulting in ETL, engineering effort, and suboptimal performance. While AI systems based on ML models can automate the analysis process, they often further generate context-rich answers. Using multiple sources of truth, for either training the models or in the form of knowledge bases, further exacerbates the problem of consolidating the data of interest. We envision an analytical engine co-optimized with components that enable context-rich analysis. Firstly, as the data from different sources or resulting from model answering cannot be cleaned ahead of time, we propose using online data integration via model-assisted similarity operations. Secondly, we aim for a holistic pipeline cost- and rule-based optimization across relational and model-based operators. Thirdly, with increasingly heterogeneous hardware and equally heterogeneous workloads ranging from traditional relational analytics to generative model inference, we envision a system that just-in-time adapts to the complex analytical query requirements. To solve increasingly complex analytical problems, ML offers attractive solutions that must be combined with traditional analytical processing and benefit from decades of database community research to achieve scalability and performance effortless for the end user.

To solve increasingly complex analytical problems, ML offers attractive solutions that must be combined with traditional analytical processing and benefit from decades of database community research to achieve scalability and performance effortless for the end user.
abstract_zh: 随着现代数据管道不断收集、生成和存储各种数据格式，从字符串、文本、视频、音频和日志等传统和上下文丰富的来源中提取和组合价值成为手动过程，而此类格式不适合 RDBMS。为了挖掘暗数据，领域专家分析并提取见解并将其集成到数据存储库中。此过程可能涉及 DBMS 外、临时分析和处理，从而导致 ETL、工程工作量和性能不佳。虽然基于机器学习模型的人工智能系统可以自动化分析过程，但它们通常会进一步生成上下文丰富的答案。使用多个事实来源来训练模型或以知识库的形式，进一步加剧了整合感兴趣数据的问题。我们设想一个与支持上下文丰富分析的组件共同优化的分析引擎。首先，由于来自不同来源或模型回答产生的数据无法提前清理，我们建议通过模型辅助相似性操作使用在线数据集成。其次，我们的目标是跨关系和基于模型的运算符进行基于管道成本和规则的整体优化。第三，随着异构硬件的不断增加以及从传统关系分析到生成模型推理的同样异构的工作负载，我们设想了一个能够及时适应复杂分析查询需求的系统。为了解决日益复杂的分析问题，机器学习提供了有吸引力的解决方案，这些解决方案必须与传统的分析处理相结合，并受益于数十年的数据库社区研究，以便最终用户轻松实现可扩展性和性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合上下文丰富处理的分析引擎，以解决多源异构数据的高效分析问题。
AI.motivation: 传统关系型数据库难以处理非结构化数据，而现有AI系统生成的上下文丰富答案与多源数据整合存在效率与一致性挑战。
AI.method: 提出三方面方法：1) 基于模型辅助的在线数据集成；2) 跨关系型与模型运算符的全局优化；3) 动态适应异构硬件与工作负载的即时调整机制。
AI.result: 构建了一个可整合多源数据、优化分析流程并适应复杂查询需求的下一代分析系统框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合机器学习与传统数据库技术，可实现高效、可扩展的上下文丰富分析，降低人工干预与计算成本。

authors_text: Maxwell A. Xu,Alexander Moreno,Supriya Nagesh,V. Burak Aydemir,David W. Wetter,Santosh Kumar,James M. Rehg
title: PulseImpute: A Novel Benchmark Task for Pulsative Physiological Signal Imputation
title_zh: PulseImpute：脉动生理信号插补的新颖基准任务
comment: NeurIPS 2022 | Code available at: https://github.com/rehg-lab/pulseimpute | Data available at: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7129964
comments: NeurIPS 2022 | Code available at: https://github.com/rehg-lab/pulseimpute | Data available at: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7129964
abstract: The promise of Mobile Health (mHealth) is the ability to use wearable sensors to monitor participant physiology at high frequencies during daily life to enable temporally-precise health interventions. However, a major challenge is frequent missing data. Despite a rich imputation literature, existing techniques are ineffective for the pulsative signals which comprise many mHealth applications, and a lack of available datasets has stymied progress. We address this gap with PulseImpute, the first large-scale pulsative signal imputation challenge which includes realistic mHealth missingness models, an extensive set of baselines, and clinically-relevant downstream tasks. Our baseline models include a novel transformer-based architecture designed to exploit the structure of pulsative signals. We hope that PulseImpute will enable the ML community to tackle this significant and challenging task.
summary: The promise of Mobile Health (mHealth) is the ability to use wearable sensors to monitor participant physiology at high frequencies during daily life to enable temporally-precise health interventions. However, a major challenge is frequent missing data. Despite a rich imputation literature, existing techniques are ineffective for the pulsative signals which comprise many mHealth applications, and a lack of available datasets has stymied progress. We address this gap with PulseImpute, the first large-scale pulsative signal imputation challenge which includes realistic mHealth missingness models, an extensive set of baselines, and clinically-relevant downstream tasks. Our baseline models include a novel transformer-based architecture designed to exploit the structure of pulsative signals. We hope that PulseImpute will enable the ML community to tackle this significant and challenging task.
abstract_zh: 移动健康 (mHealth) 的前景是能够使用可穿戴传感器在日常生活中高频度监测参与者的生理机能，从而实现临时精确的健康干预措施。然而，一个主要挑战是频繁丢失数据。尽管有丰富的插补文献，但现有技术对于构成许多移动医疗应用的脉动信号无效，并且缺乏可用数据集阻碍了进展。我们通过 PulseImpute 解决了这一差距，这是第一个大规模脉动信号插补挑战，其中包括现实的 mHealth 缺失模型、广泛的基线集和临床相关的下游任务。我们的基线模型包括一种新颖的基于变压器的架构，旨在利用脉动信号的结构。我们希望 PulseImpute 能够帮助机器学习社区解决这一重大且具有挑战性的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PulseImpute，一个针对可穿戴设备中脉冲式生理信号缺失数据的新型基准任务。
AI.motivation: 移动健康（mHealth）面临脉冲式信号缺失数据处理难题，现有方法效果不佳且缺乏相关数据集，阻碍了研究进展。
AI.method: 构建包含真实缺失模型的数据集，设计基于Transformer的基线模型，并设置临床相关下游任务作为评估框架。
AI.result: 建立了首个大规模脉冲信号填补基准，提供了多种基线方法和评估任务，推动了该领域的研究。
AI.conclusion: PulseImpute为解决mHealth中脉冲信号缺失问题提供了标准化测试平台，有助于促进相关算法的发展。

search_text: PulseImpute: A Novel Benchmark Task for Pulsative Physiological Signal Imputation PulseImpute：脉动生理信号插补的新颖基准任务 The promise of Mobile Health (mHealth) is the ability to use wearable sensors to monitor participant physiology at high frequencies during daily life to enable temporally-precise health interventions. However, a major challenge is frequent missing data. Despite a rich imputation literature, existing techniques are ineffective for the pulsative signals which comprise many mHealth applications, and a lack of available datasets has stymied progress. We address this gap with PulseImpute, the first large-scale pulsative signal imputation challenge which includes realistic mHealth missingness models, an extensive set of baselines, and clinically-relevant downstream tasks. Our baseline models include a novel transformer-based architecture designed to exploit the structure of pulsative signals. We hope that PulseImpute will enable the ML community to tackle this significant and challenging task. 移动健康 (mHealth) 的前景是能够使用可穿戴传感器在日常生活中高频度监测参与者的生理机能，从而实现临时精确的健康干预措施。然而，一个主要挑战是频繁丢失数据。尽管有丰富的插补文献，但现有技术对于构成许多移动医疗应用的脉动信号无效，并且缺乏可用数据集阻碍了进展。我们通过 PulseImpute 解决了这一差距，这是第一个大规模脉动信号插补挑战，其中包括现实的 mHealth 缺失模型、广泛的基线集和临床相关的下游任务。我们的基线模型包括一种新颖的基于变压器的架构，旨在利用脉动信号的结构。我们希望 PulseImpute 能够帮助机器学习社区解决这一重大且具有挑战性的任务。 本文提出PulseImpute，一个针对可穿戴设备中脉冲式生理信号缺失数据的新型基准任务。 Maxwell A. Xu,Alexander Moreno,Supriya Nagesh,V. Burak Aydemir,David W. Wetter,Santosh Kumar,James M. Rehg cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Teresa Datta,Daniel Nissani,Max Cembalest,Akash Khanna,Haley Massa,John P. Dickerson
title: Tensions Between the Proxies of Human Values in AI
title_zh: 人工智能中人类价值观代理之间的紧张关系
comment: Contributed Talk, NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Algorithmic Fairness through the Lens of Causality and Privacy; To be published in 2023 IEEE Conference on Secure and Trustworthy Machine Learning (SaTML)
comments: Contributed Talk, NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Algorithmic Fairness through the Lens of Causality and Privacy; To be published in 2023 IEEE Conference on Secure and Trustworthy Machine Learning (SaTML)
abstract: Motivated by mitigating potentially harmful impacts of technologies, the AI community has formulated and accepted mathematical definitions for certain pillars of accountability: e.g. privacy, fairness, and model transparency. Yet, we argue this is fundamentally misguided because these definitions are imperfect, siloed constructions of the human values they hope to proxy, while giving the guise that those values are sufficiently embedded in our technologies. Under popularized methods, tensions arise when practitioners attempt to achieve each pillar of fairness, privacy, and transparency in isolation or simultaneously. In this position paper, we push for redirection. We argue that the AI community needs to consider all the consequences of choosing certain formulations of these pillars -- not just the technical incompatibilities, but also the effects within the context of deployment. We point towards sociotechnical research for frameworks for the latter, but push for broader efforts into implementing these in practice.
summary: Motivated by mitigating potentially harmful impacts of technologies, the AI community has formulated and accepted mathematical definitions for certain pillars of accountability: e.g. privacy, fairness, and model transparency. Yet, we argue this is fundamentally misguided because these definitions are imperfect, siloed constructions of the human values they hope to proxy, while giving the guise that those values are sufficiently embedded in our technologies. Under popularized methods, tensions arise when practitioners attempt to achieve each pillar of fairness, privacy, and transparency in isolation or simultaneously. In this position paper, we push for redirection. We argue that the AI community needs to consider all the consequences of choosing certain formulations of these pillars -- not just the technical incompatibilities, but also the effects within the context of deployment. We point towards sociotechnical research for frameworks for the latter, but push for broader efforts into implementing these in practice.
abstract_zh: 为了减轻技术的潜在有害影响，人工智能社区已经为某些问责支柱制定并接受了数学定义：例如隐私、公平和模型透明度。然而，我们认为这从根本上是误导的，因为这些定义是不完美的，是它们希望代表的人类价值观的孤立结构，同时又假装这些价值观已充分嵌入我们的技术中。在流行的方法下，当从业者试图单独或同时实现公平、隐私和透明度的各个支柱时，就会出现紧张。在这份立场文件中，我们推动重定向。我们认为，人工智能社区需要考虑选择这些支柱的某些表述的所有后果——不仅是技术不兼容性，还包括部署环境中的影响。我们针对后者的框架进行社会技术研究，但推动更广泛的努力在实践中实施这些框架。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了人工智能领域中隐私、公平性和透明性等人类价值观代理之间的矛盾，并主张需要更全面的框架来解决这些问题。
AI.motivation: 当前AI社区对隐私、公平性和透明性等价值观的数学定义存在缺陷，导致在实际应用中产生矛盾，需重新审视这些代理的定义和影响。
AI.method: 通过批判性分析现有方法，指出其技术不兼容性和部署环境中的影响，并提出需要结合社会技术研究的框架。
AI.result: 揭示了现有代理定义的不足，强调需综合考虑技术与社会因素，推动更实际的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: AI社区应转向社会技术研究，开发更全面的框架，并在实践中实施这些价值观的整合方案。

authors_text: Gustav Müller-Franzes,Jan Moritz Niehues,Firas Khader,Soroosh Tayebi Arasteh,Christoph Haarburger,Christiane Kuhl,Tianci Wang,Tianyu Han,Sven Nebelung,Jakob Nikolas Kather,Daniel Truhn
title: Diffusion Probabilistic Models beat GANs on Medical Images
title_zh: 扩散概率模型在医学图像上击败了 GAN
abstract: The success of Deep Learning applications critically depends on the quality and scale of the underlying training data. Generative adversarial networks (GANs) can generate arbitrary large datasets, but diversity and fidelity are limited, which has recently been addressed by denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) whose superiority has been demonstrated on natural images. In this study, we propose Medfusion, a conditional latent DDPM for medical images. We compare our DDPM-based model against GAN-based models, which constitute the current state-of-the-art in the medical domain. Medfusion was trained and compared with (i) StyleGan-3 on n=101,442 images from the AIROGS challenge dataset to generate fundoscopies with and without glaucoma, (ii) ProGAN on n=191,027 from the CheXpert dataset to generate radiographs with and without cardiomegaly and (iii) wGAN on n=19,557 images from the CRCMS dataset to generate histopathological images with and without microsatellite stability. In the AIROGS, CRMCS, and CheXpert datasets, Medfusion achieved lower (=better) FID than the GANs (11.63 versus 20.43, 30.03 versus 49.26, and 17.28 versus 84.31). Also, fidelity (precision) and diversity (recall) were higher (=better) for Medfusion in all three datasets. Our study shows that DDPM are a superior alternative to GANs for image synthesis in the medical domain.
summary: The success of Deep Learning applications critically depends on the quality and scale of the underlying training data. Generative adversarial networks (GANs) can generate arbitrary large datasets, but diversity and fidelity are limited, which has recently been addressed by denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) whose superiority has been demonstrated on natural images. In this study, we propose Medfusion, a conditional latent DDPM for medical images. We compare our DDPM-based model against GAN-based models, which constitute the current state-of-the-art in the medical domain. Medfusion was trained and compared with (i) StyleGan-3 on n=101,442 images from the AIROGS challenge dataset to generate fundoscopies with and without glaucoma, (ii) ProGAN on n=191,027 from the CheXpert dataset to generate radiographs with and without cardiomegaly and (iii) wGAN on n=19,557 images from the CRCMS dataset to generate histopathological images with and without microsatellite stability. In the AIROGS, CRMCS, and CheXpert datasets, Medfusion achieved lower (=better) FID than the GANs (11.63 versus 20.43, 30.03 versus 49.26, and 17.28 versus 84.31). Also, fidelity (precision) and diversity (recall) were higher (=better) for Medfusion in all three datasets. Our study shows that DDPM are a superior alternative to GANs for image synthesis in the medical domain.
abstract_zh: 深度学习应用程序的成功关键取决于基础训练数据的质量和规模。生成对抗网络（GAN）可以生成任意大型数据集，但多样性和保真度有限，最近通过去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）解决了这个问题，其优越性已在自然图像上得到证明。在这项研究中，我们提出了 Medfusion，一种用于医学图像的条件潜在 DDPM。我们将基于 DDPM 的模型与基于 GAN 的模型进行比较，后者构成了医学领域当前最先进的模型。 Medfusion 进行了训练，并与 (i) StyleGan-3 对来自 AIROGS 挑战数据集的 n=101,442 幅图像进行比较，以生成有或没有青光眼的眼底镜检查；(ii) ProGAN 在来自 CheXpert 数据集的 n=191,027 幅图像上进行比较，以生成有或没有心脏肥大的 X 光照片；(iii) wGAN 在来自 CRCMS 数据集的 n=19,557 幅图像上，以生成有或没有心脏肥大的组织病理学图像微卫星稳定性。在 AIROGS、CRMCS 和 CheXpert 数据集中，Medfusion 实现了比 GAN 更低（=更好）的 FID（11.63 与 20.43、30.03 与 49.26 以及 17.28 与 84.31）。此外，Medfusion 在所有三个数据集中的保真度（精确度）和多样性（召回率）都更高（=更好）。我们的研究表明，在医学领域的图像合成中，DDPM 是 GAN 的更好替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种条件潜在扩散概率模型Medfusion，用于生成医学图像，并在多个数据集上验证其优于GANs的性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像生成依赖高质量数据，但现有GANs存在多样性和保真度不足的问题，而扩散概率模型在自然图像上表现优异，需验证其在医学领域的有效性。
AI.method: 开发条件潜在DDPM模型Medfusion，在AIROGS、CheXpert和CRCMS三个医学数据集上分别与StyleGAN-3、ProGAN和wGAN对比，通过FID、精度和召回率评估生成效果。
AI.result: Medfusion在三个数据集上的FID均低于GANs（11.63 vs 20.43，30.03 vs 49.26，17.28 vs 84.31），且精度和召回率均更高，证明其生成图像质量更优。
AI.conclusion: 扩散概率模型在医学图像合成任务中显著优于当前主流GANs，可作为更优的生成方法替代方案。

authors_text: Bruno Machado Pacheco,Guilherme de Souza e Cassia,Danilo Silva
title: Towards fully automated deep-learning-based brain tumor segmentation: is brain extraction still necessary?
title_zh: 迈向基于深度学习的全自动脑肿瘤分割：大脑提取仍然有必要吗？
abstract: State-of-the-art brain tumor segmentation is based on deep learning models applied to multi-modal MRIs. Currently, these models are trained on images after a preprocessing stage that involves registration, interpolation, brain extraction (BE, also known as skull-stripping) and manual correction by an expert. However, for clinical practice, this last step is tedious and time-consuming and, therefore, not always feasible, resulting in skull-stripping faults that can negatively impact the tumor segmentation quality. Still, the extent of this impact has never been measured for any of the many different BE methods available. In this work, we propose an automatic brain tumor segmentation pipeline and evaluate its performance with multiple BE methods. Our experiments show that the choice of a BE method can compromise up to 15.7% of the tumor segmentation performance. Moreover, we propose training and testing tumor segmentation models on non-skull-stripped images, effectively discarding the BE step from the pipeline. Our results show that this approach leads to a competitive performance at a fraction of the time. We conclude that, in contrast to the current paradigm, training tumor segmentation models on non-skull-stripped images can be the best option when high performance in clinical practice is desired.
summary: State-of-the-art brain tumor segmentation is based on deep learning models applied to multi-modal MRIs. Currently, these models are trained on images after a preprocessing stage that involves registration, interpolation, brain extraction (BE, also known as skull-stripping) and manual correction by an expert. However, for clinical practice, this last step is tedious and time-consuming and, therefore, not always feasible, resulting in skull-stripping faults that can negatively impact the tumor segmentation quality. Still, the extent of this impact has never been measured for any of the many different BE methods available. In this work, we propose an automatic brain tumor segmentation pipeline and evaluate its performance with multiple BE methods. Our experiments show that the choice of a BE method can compromise up to 15.7% of the tumor segmentation performance. Moreover, we propose training and testing tumor segmentation models on non-skull-stripped images, effectively discarding the BE step from the pipeline. Our results show that this approach leads to a competitive performance at a fraction of the time. We conclude that, in contrast to the current paradigm, training tumor segmentation models on non-skull-stripped images can be the best option when high performance in clinical practice is desired.
abstract_zh: 最先进的脑肿瘤分割基于应用于多模态 MRI 的深度学习模型。目前，这些模型在预处理阶段之后对图像进行训练，包括配准、插值、大脑提取（BE，也称为颅骨剥离）和专家的手动校正。然而，对于临床实践来说，最后一步是乏味且耗时的，因此并不总是可行，导致颅骨剥离错误，可能对肿瘤分割质量产生负面影响。尽管如此，许多不同的可用 BE 方法中的任何一种都从未测量过这种影响的程度。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种自动脑肿瘤分割流程，并使用多种 BE 方法评估其性能。我们的实验表明，BE 方法的选择可能会影响肿瘤分割性能高达 15.7%。此外，我们建议在非头骨剥离图像上训练和测试肿瘤分割模型，有效地从流程中丢弃 BE 步骤。我们的结果表明，这种方法可以在很短的时间内带来有竞争力的表现。我们的结论是，与当前的范例相比，当需要在临床实践中获得高性能时，在非颅骨剥离图像上训练肿瘤分割模型可能是最佳选择。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了脑提取（BE）步骤在深度学习脑肿瘤分割中的必要性，并提出无需BE的自动分割方法。
AI.motivation: 当前脑肿瘤分割流程依赖耗时的手动校正步骤，导致脑提取错误影响分割质量，但不同BE方法的影响尚未量化。
AI.method: 提出自动分割流程，对比多种BE方法的影响，并在非脑提取图像上训练测试模型以省去BE步骤。
AI.result: BE方法选择可导致分割性能下降15.7%，而直接处理非脑提取图像的方法在时间效率上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 在临床实践中，直接训练模型处理未脑提取图像可能比传统流程更高效且性能相当。
