search_text: Towards fully automated deep-learning-based brain tumor segmentation: is brain extraction still necessary? 迈向基于深度学习的全自动脑肿瘤分割：大脑提取仍然有必要吗？ State-of-the-art brain tumor segmentation is based on deep learning models applied to multi-modal MRIs. Currently, these models are trained on images after a preprocessing stage that involves registration, interpolation, brain extraction (BE, also known as skull-stripping) and manual correction by an expert. However, for clinical practice, this last step is tedious and time-consuming and, therefore, not always feasible, resulting in skull-stripping faults that can negatively impact the tumor segmentation quality. Still, the extent of this impact has never been measured for any of the many different BE methods available. In this work, we propose an automatic brain tumor segmentation pipeline and evaluate its performance with multiple BE methods. Our experiments show that the choice of a BE method can compromise up to 15.7% of the tumor segmentation performance. Moreover, we propose training and testing tumor segmentation models on non-skull-stripped images, effectively discarding the BE step from the pipeline. Our results show that this approach leads to a competitive performance at a fraction of the time. We conclude that, in contrast to the current paradigm, training tumor segmentation models on non-skull-stripped images can be the best option when high performance in clinical practice is desired. 最先进的脑肿瘤分割基于应用于多模态 MRI 的深度学习模型。目前，这些模型在预处理阶段之后对图像进行训练，包括配准、插值、大脑提取（BE，也称为颅骨剥离）和专家的手动校正。然而，对于临床实践来说，最后一步是乏味且耗时的，因此并不总是可行，导致颅骨剥离错误，可能对肿瘤分割质量产生负面影响。尽管如此，许多不同的可用 BE 方法中的任何一种都从未测量过这种影响的程度。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种自动脑肿瘤分割流程，并使用多种 BE 方法评估其性能。我们的实验表明，BE 方法的选择可能会影响肿瘤分割性能高达 15.7%。此外，我们建议在非头骨剥离图像上训练和测试肿瘤分割模型，有效地从流程中丢弃 BE 步骤。我们的结果表明，这种方法可以在很短的时间内带来有竞争力的表现。我们的结论是，与当前的范例相比，当需要在临床实践中获得高性能时，在非颅骨剥离图像上训练肿瘤分割模型可能是最佳选择。 本文评估了脑提取（BE）步骤在深度学习脑肿瘤分割中的必要性，并提出无需BE的自动分割方法。 Bruno Machado Pacheco,Guilherme de Souza e Cassia,Danilo Silva eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Tooba Imtiaz,Morgan Kohler,Jared Miller,Zifeng Wang,Masih Eskandar,Mario Sznaier,Octavia Camps,Jennifer Dy
title: SAIF: Sparse Adversarial and Imperceptible Attack Framework
title_zh: SAIF：稀疏对抗性和难以察觉的攻击框架
abstract: Adversarial attacks hamper the decision-making ability of neural networks by perturbing the input signal. The addition of calculated small distortion to images, for instance, can deceive a well-trained image classification network. In this work, we propose a novel attack technique called Sparse Adversarial and Interpretable Attack Framework (SAIF). Specifically, we design imperceptible attacks that contain low-magnitude perturbations at a small number of pixels and leverage these sparse attacks to reveal the vulnerability of classifiers. We use the Frank-Wolfe (conditional gradient) algorithm to simultaneously optimize the attack perturbations for bounded magnitude and sparsity with $O(1/\sqrt{T})$ convergence. Empirical results show that SAIF computes highly imperceptible and interpretable adversarial examples, and outperforms state-of-the-art sparse attack methods on the ImageNet dataset.
summary: Adversarial attacks hamper the decision-making ability of neural networks by perturbing the input signal. The addition of calculated small distortion to images, for instance, can deceive a well-trained image classification network. In this work, we propose a novel attack technique called Sparse Adversarial and Interpretable Attack Framework (SAIF). Specifically, we design imperceptible attacks that contain low-magnitude perturbations at a small number of pixels and leverage these sparse attacks to reveal the vulnerability of classifiers. We use the Frank-Wolfe (conditional gradient) algorithm to simultaneously optimize the attack perturbations for bounded magnitude and sparsity with $O(1/\sqrt{T})$ convergence. Empirical results show that SAIF computes highly imperceptible and interpretable adversarial examples, and outperforms state-of-the-art sparse attack methods on the ImageNet dataset.
abstract_zh: 对抗性攻击通过扰乱输入信号来阻碍神经网络的决策能力。例如，向图像添加计算出的小失真可能会欺骗训练有素的图像分类网络。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为稀疏对抗和可解释攻击框架（SAIF）的新颖攻击技术。具体来说，我们设计了难以察觉的攻击，其中包含少量像素的低幅度扰动，并利用这些稀疏攻击来揭示分类器的漏洞。我们使用 Frank-Wolfe（条件梯度）算法以 $O(1/\sqrt{T})$ 收敛性同时优化攻击扰动，以实现有界幅度和稀疏性。实证结果表明，SAIF 计算了高度难以察觉和可解释的对抗性示例，并且在 ImageNet 数据集上优于最先进的稀疏攻击方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SAIF的新攻击框架，用于生成稀疏且不易察觉的对抗样本，以揭示分类器的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法可能无法在保持低扰动幅度的同时实现稀疏性，而稀疏攻击能更有效地暴露模型漏洞并提升可解释性。
AI.method: 利用Frank-Wolfe算法同时优化扰动的幅度和稀疏性，以O(1/√T)收敛速度生成像素级稀疏的对抗样本。
AI.result: 实验表明，SAIF在ImageNet数据集上生成的对抗样本具有更高的不可感知性和可解释性，优于现有最先进的稀疏攻击方法。
AI.conclusion: SAIF通过稀疏性约束和高效优化算法，为对抗攻击提供了更有效且具有解释性的解决方案，揭示了深度学习模型的潜在脆弱性。

authors_text: Thaha Mohammed,Rashid Mehmood
title: Performance Enhancement Strategies for Sparse Matrix-Vector Multiplication (SpMV) and Iterative Linear Solvers
title_zh: 稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 和迭代线性求解器的性能增强策略
abstract: Iterative solutions of sparse linear systems and sparse eigenvalue problems have a fundamental role in vital fields of scientific research and engineering. The crucial computing kernel for such iterative solutions is the multiplication of a sparse matrix by a dense vector. Efficient implementation of sparse matrix-vector multiplication (SpMV) and linear solvers are therefore essential and has been subjected to extensive research across a variety of computing architectures and accelerators such as central processing units (CPUs), graphical processing units (GPUs), many integrated cores (MICs), and field programmable gate arrays (FPGAs). Unleashing the full potential of an architecture/accelerator requires determining the factors that affect an efficient implementation of SpMV. This article presents the first of its kind, in-depth survey covering over two hundred state-of-the-art optimization schemes for solving sparse iterative linear systems with a focus on computing SpMV. A new taxonomy for iterative solutions and SpMV techniques common to all architectures is proposed. This article includes reviews of SpMV techniques for all architectures to consolidate a single taxonomy to encourage cross-architectural and heterogeneous-architecture developments. However, the primary focus is on GPUs. The major contributions as well as the primary, secondary, and tertiary contributions of the SpMV techniques are first highlighted utilizing the taxonomy and then qualitatively compared. A summary of the current state of the research for each architecture is discussed separately. Finally, several open problems and key challenges for future research directions are outlined.
summary: Iterative solutions of sparse linear systems and sparse eigenvalue problems have a fundamental role in vital fields of scientific research and engineering. The crucial computing kernel for such iterative solutions is the multiplication of a sparse matrix by a dense vector. Efficient implementation of sparse matrix-vector multiplication (SpMV) and linear solvers are therefore essential and has been subjected to extensive research across a variety of computing architectures and accelerators such as central processing units (CPUs), graphical processing units (GPUs), many integrated cores (MICs), and field programmable gate arrays (FPGAs). Unleashing the full potential of an architecture/accelerator requires determining the factors that affect an efficient implementation of SpMV. This article presents the first of its kind, in-depth survey covering over two hundred state-of-the-art optimization schemes for solving sparse iterative linear systems with a focus on computing SpMV. A new taxonomy for iterative solutions and SpMV techniques common to all architectures is proposed. This article includes reviews of SpMV techniques for all architectures to consolidate a single taxonomy to encourage cross-architectural and heterogeneous-architecture developments. However, the primary focus is on GPUs. The major contributions as well as the primary, secondary, and tertiary contributions of the SpMV techniques are first highlighted utilizing the taxonomy and then qualitatively compared. A summary of the current state of the research for each architecture is discussed separately. Finally, several open problems and key challenges for future research directions are outlined.
abstract_zh: 稀疏线性系统和稀疏特征值问题的迭代解决方案在科学研究和工程的重要领域中具有基础性作用。这种迭代解决方案的关键计算内核是稀疏矩阵与稠密向量的乘法。因此，稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 和线性求解器的高效实现至关重要，并且已经在各种计算架构和加速器（例如中央处理单元 (CPU)、图形处理单元 (GPU)、许多集成内核 (MIC) 和现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA)）中进行了广泛的研究。释放架构/加速器的全部潜力需要确定影响 SpMV 有效实施的因素。本文首次进行了此类深入调查，涵盖了 200 多种最先进的优化方案，用于求解稀疏迭代线性系统，重点是计算 SpMV。提出了一种新的迭代解决方案分类法和所有架构通用的 SpMV 技术。本文对所有架构的 SpMV 技术进行了回顾，以巩固单一分类法，以鼓励跨架构和异构架构的开发。然而，主要关注点是 GPU。首先利用分类法强调 SpMV 技术的主要贡献以及主要、次要和第三次贡献，然后进行定性比较。每种架构的研究现状总结将单独讨论。最后，概述了未来研究方向的几个悬而未决的问题和关键挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了稀疏矩阵-向量乘法（SpMV）及迭代线性求解器的性能优化策略，重点分析了不同计算架构下的实现方法。
AI.motivation: 稀疏线性系统和特征值问题在科学与工程领域至关重要，而SpMV作为其核心计算内核，需针对多种计算架构（如GPU）进行高效优化以释放硬件潜力。
AI.method: 提出统一的分类体系，系统梳理200余种优化方案，按架构分类总结技术特点，并重点对比GPU相关方法的优劣及研究现状。
AI.result: 构建了跨架构的SpMV技术分类框架，总结各架构研究进展，明确主要贡献层级，并指出当前研究的开放问题与挑战。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一分类促进异构计算发展，强调GPU优化的重要性，为未来SpMV及迭代求解器的研究提供方向指引。

search_text: Performance Enhancement Strategies for Sparse Matrix-Vector Multiplication (SpMV) and Iterative Linear Solvers 稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 和迭代线性求解器的性能增强策略 Iterative solutions of sparse linear systems and sparse eigenvalue problems have a fundamental role in vital fields of scientific research and engineering. The crucial computing kernel for such iterative solutions is the multiplication of a sparse matrix by a dense vector. Efficient implementation of sparse matrix-vector multiplication (SpMV) and linear solvers are therefore essential and has been subjected to extensive research across a variety of computing architectures and accelerators such as central processing units (CPUs), graphical processing units (GPUs), many integrated cores (MICs), and field programmable gate arrays (FPGAs). Unleashing the full potential of an architecture/accelerator requires determining the factors that affect an efficient implementation of SpMV. This article presents the first of its kind, in-depth survey covering over two hundred state-of-the-art optimization schemes for solving sparse iterative linear systems with a focus on computing SpMV. A new taxonomy for iterative solutions and SpMV techniques common to all architectures is proposed. This article includes reviews of SpMV techniques for all architectures to consolidate a single taxonomy to encourage cross-architectural and heterogeneous-architecture developments. However, the primary focus is on GPUs. The major contributions as well as the primary, secondary, and tertiary contributions of the SpMV techniques are first highlighted utilizing the taxonomy and then qualitatively compared. A summary of the current state of the research for each architecture is discussed separately. Finally, several open problems and key challenges for future research directions are outlined. 稀疏线性系统和稀疏特征值问题的迭代解决方案在科学研究和工程的重要领域中具有基础性作用。这种迭代解决方案的关键计算内核是稀疏矩阵与稠密向量的乘法。因此，稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 和线性求解器的高效实现至关重要，并且已经在各种计算架构和加速器（例如中央处理单元 (CPU)、图形处理单元 (GPU)、许多集成内核 (MIC) 和现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA)）中进行了广泛的研究。释放架构/加速器的全部潜力需要确定影响 SpMV 有效实施的因素。本文首次进行了此类深入调查，涵盖了 200 多种最先进的优化方案，用于求解稀疏迭代线性系统，重点是计算 SpMV。提出了一种新的迭代解决方案分类法和所有架构通用的 SpMV 技术。本文对所有架构的 SpMV 技术进行了回顾，以巩固单一分类法，以鼓励跨架构和异构架构的开发。然而，主要关注点是 GPU。首先利用分类法强调 SpMV 技术的主要贡献以及主要、次要和第三次贡献，然后进行定性比较。每种架构的研究现状总结将单独讨论。最后，概述了未来研究方向的几个悬而未决的问题和关键挑战。 本文综述了稀疏矩阵-向量乘法（SpMV）及迭代线性求解器的性能优化策略，重点分析了不同计算架构下的实现方法。 Thaha Mohammed,Rashid Mehmood cs.DS,math.NA

authors_text: Brahma S. Pavse,Josiah P. Hanna
title: Scaling Marginalized Importance Sampling to High-Dimensional State-Spaces via State Abstraction
title_zh: 通过状态抽象将边缘化重要性采样扩展到高维状态空间
abstract: We consider the problem of off-policy evaluation (OPE) in reinforcement learning (RL), where the goal is to estimate the performance of an evaluation policy, $π_e$, using a fixed dataset, $\mathcal{D}$, collected by one or more policies that may be different from $π_e$. Current OPE algorithms may produce poor OPE estimates under policy distribution shift i.e., when the probability of a particular state-action pair occurring under $π_e$ is very different from the probability of that same pair occurring in $\mathcal{D}$ (Voloshin et al. 2021, Fu et al. 2021). In this work, we propose to improve the accuracy of OPE estimators by projecting the high-dimensional state-space into a low-dimensional state-space using concepts from the state abstraction literature. Specifically, we consider marginalized importance sampling (MIS) OPE algorithms which compute state-action distribution correction ratios to produce their OPE estimate. In the original ground state-space, these ratios may have high variance which may lead to high variance OPE. However, we prove that in the lower-dimensional abstract state-space the ratios can have lower variance resulting in lower variance OPE. We then highlight the challenges that arise when estimating the abstract ratios from data, identify sufficient conditions to overcome these issues, and present a minimax optimization problem whose solution yields these abstract ratios. Finally, our empirical evaluation on difficult, high-dimensional state-space OPE tasks shows that the abstract ratios can make MIS OPE estimators achieve lower mean-squared error and more robust to hyperparameter tuning than the ground ratios.
summary: We consider the problem of off-policy evaluation (OPE) in reinforcement learning (RL), where the goal is to estimate the performance of an evaluation policy, $π_e$, using a fixed dataset, $\mathcal{D}$, collected by one or more policies that may be different from $π_e$. Current OPE algorithms may produce poor OPE estimates under policy distribution shift i.e., when the probability of a particular state-action pair occurring under $π_e$ is very different from the probability of that same pair occurring in $\mathcal{D}$ (Voloshin et al. 2021, Fu et al. 2021). In this work, we propose to improve the accuracy of OPE estimators by projecting the high-dimensional state-space into a low-dimensional state-space using concepts from the state abstraction literature. Specifically, we consider marginalized importance sampling (MIS) OPE algorithms which compute state-action distribution correction ratios to produce their OPE estimate. In the original ground state-space, these ratios may have high variance which may lead to high variance OPE. However, we prove that in the lower-dimensional abstract state-space the ratios can have lower variance resulting in lower variance OPE. We then highlight the challenges that arise when estimating the abstract ratios from data, identify sufficient conditions to overcome these issues, and present a minimax optimization problem whose solution yields these abstract ratios. Finally, our empirical evaluation on difficult, high-dimensional state-space OPE tasks shows that the abstract ratios can make MIS OPE estimators achieve lower mean-squared error and more robust to hyperparameter tuning than the ground ratios.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑强化学习（RL）中的离策略评估（OPE）问题，其目标是使用固定数据集 $\mathcal{D}$ 来估计评估策略 $π_e$ 的性能，该数据集由可能与 $π_e$ 不同的一个或多个策略收集。当前的 OPE 算法可能会在策略分布偏移下产生较差的 OPE 估计，即当 $π_e$ 下发生的特定状态-动作对的概率与 $\mathcal{D}$ 下发生的同一对的概率非常不同时（Voloshin et al. 2021，Fu et al. 2021）。在这项工作中，我们建议通过使用状态抽象文献中的概念将高维状态空间投影到低维状态空间来提高 OPE 估计器的准确性。具体来说，我们考虑边缘化重要性采样（MIS）OPE 算法，该算法计算状态动作分布校正比以产生 OPE 估计。在原始基态空间中，这些比率可能具有高方差，这可能导致高方差 OPE。然而，我们证明在低维抽象状态空间中，比率可以具有较低的方差，从而导致较低的方差 OPE。然后，我们强调从数据估计抽象比率时出现的挑战，确定克服这些问题的充分条件，并提出一个极小极大优化问题，其解决方案产生这些抽象比率。最后，我们对困难的高维状态空间 OPE 任务的实证评估表明，抽象比率可以使 MIS OPE 估计器实现比基本比率更低的均方误差和对超参数调整更鲁棒的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过状态抽象将高维状态空间映射到低维空间，以改进强化学习中的离线策略评估（OPE）方法。
AI.motivation: 当前OPE算法在策略分布偏移情况下估计误差较大，高维状态空间中的状态-动作分布校正比方差较高，导致估计不稳定。
AI.method: 基于状态抽象理论，将高维状态空间投影到低维抽象空间，通过构建最小最大优化问题估计抽象空间中的校正比，降低方差。
AI.result: 实验表明，抽象空间中的校正比使MIS估计器在高维任务中均方误差更低，且对超参数更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 状态抽象有效降低了OPE估计方差，为高维状态空间的策略评估提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Niklas Deckers,Maik Fröbe,Johannes Kiesel,Gianluca Pandolfo,Christopher Schröder,Benno Stein,Martin Potthast
title: The Infinite Index: Information Retrieval on Generative Text-To-Image Models
title_zh: 无限索引：生成文本到图像模型的信息检索
abstract: Conditional generative models such as DALL-E and Stable Diffusion generate images based on a user-defined text, the prompt. Finding and refining prompts that produce a desired image has become the art of prompt engineering. Generative models do not provide a built-in retrieval model for a user's information need expressed through prompts. In light of an extensive literature review, we reframe prompt engineering for generative models as interactive text-based retrieval on a novel kind of "infinite index". We apply these insights for the first time in a case study on image generation for game design with an expert. Finally, we envision how active learning may help to guide the retrieval of generated images.
summary: Conditional generative models such as DALL-E and Stable Diffusion generate images based on a user-defined text, the prompt. Finding and refining prompts that produce a desired image has become the art of prompt engineering. Generative models do not provide a built-in retrieval model for a user's information need expressed through prompts. In light of an extensive literature review, we reframe prompt engineering for generative models as interactive text-based retrieval on a novel kind of "infinite index". We apply these insights for the first time in a case study on image generation for game design with an expert. Finally, we envision how active learning may help to guide the retrieval of generated images.
abstract_zh: DALL-E 和稳定扩散等条件生成模型根据用户定义的文本（提示）生成图像。寻找和完善能够产生所需图像的提示已成为提示工程的艺术。生成模型不为用户通过提示表达的信息需求提供内置的检索模型。根据广泛的文献综述，我们将生成模型的即时工程重新定义为一种新型“无限索引”上基于交互式文本的检索。我们首次在专家的游戏设计图像生成案例研究中应用这些见解。最后，我们设想主动学习如何帮助指导生成图像的检索。

AI.tldr: 本文将生成式文本到图像模型的提示工程重新定义为基于新型'无限索引'的交互式文本检索问题，并通过游戏设计案例验证该框架。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型缺乏内置检索系统，用户需通过耗时的提示工程优化文本输入，难以满足复杂的信息检索需求。
AI.method: 通过文献综述重构提示工程理论框架，提出'无限索引'概念，并在游戏设计场景中开展专家参与的案例研究，探索主动学习的辅助作用。
AI.result: 成功建立生成图像的信息检索框架，验证了交互式检索在游戏设计中的可行性，并提出主动学习优化检索效率的潜在方向。
AI.conclusion: 生成模型的信息检索应突破传统范式，通过'无限索引'理论结合主动学习，可系统化解决提示工程中的检索难题。

result: 成功建立生成图像的信息检索框架，验证了交互式检索在游戏设计中的可行性，并提出主动学习优化检索效率的潜在方向。
conclusion: 生成模型的信息检索应突破传统范式，通过'无限索引'理论结合主动学习，可系统化解决提示工程中的检索难题。
search_text: The Infinite Index: Information Retrieval on Generative Text-To-Image Models 无限索引：生成文本到图像模型的信息检索 Conditional generative models such as DALL-E and Stable Diffusion generate images based on a user-defined text, the prompt. Finding and refining prompts that produce a desired image has become the art of prompt engineering. Generative models do not provide a built-in retrieval model for a user's information need expressed through prompts. In light of an extensive literature review, we reframe prompt engineering for generative models as interactive text-based retrieval on a novel kind of "infinite index". We apply these insights for the first time in a case study on image generation for game design with an expert. Finally, we envision how active learning may help to guide the retrieval of generated images. DALL-E 和稳定扩散等条件生成模型根据用户定义的文本（提示）生成图像。寻找和完善能够产生所需图像的提示已成为提示工程的艺术。生成模型不为用户通过提示表达的信息需求提供内置的检索模型。根据广泛的文献综述，我们将生成模型的即时工程重新定义为一种新型“无限索引”上基于交互式文本的检索。我们首次在专家的游戏设计图像生成案例研究中应用这些见解。最后，我们设想主动学习如何帮助指导生成图像的检索。 本文将生成式文本到图像模型的提示工程重新定义为基于新型'无限索引'的交互式文本检索问题，并通过游戏设计案例验证该框架。 Niklas Deckers,Maik Fröbe,Johannes Kiesel,Gianluca Pandolfo,Christopher Schröder,Benno Stein,Martin Potthast cs.IR,cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Mo Tiwari,Ryan Kang,Je-Yong Lee,Sebastian Thrun,Chris Piech,Ilan Shomorony,Martin Jinye Zhang
title: MABSplit: Faster Forest Training Using Multi-Armed Bandits
title_zh: MABSplit：使用多臂强盗加快森林训练
abstract: Random forests are some of the most widely used machine learning models today, especially in domains that necessitate interpretability. We present an algorithm that accelerates the training of random forests and other popular tree-based learning methods. At the core of our algorithm is a novel node-splitting subroutine, dubbed MABSplit, used to efficiently find split points when constructing decision trees. Our algorithm borrows techniques from the multi-armed bandit literature to judiciously determine how to allocate samples and computational power across candidate split points. We provide theoretical guarantees that MABSplit improves the sample complexity of each node split from linear to logarithmic in the number of data points. In some settings, MABSplit leads to 100x faster training (an 99% reduction in training time) without any decrease in generalization performance. We demonstrate similar speedups when MABSplit is used across a variety of forest-based variants, such as Extremely Random Forests and Random Patches. We also show our algorithm can be used in both classification and regression tasks. Finally, we show that MABSplit outperforms existing methods in generalization performance and feature importance calculations under a fixed computational budget. All of our experimental results are reproducible via a one-line script at https://github.com/ThrunGroup/FastForest.
summary: Random forests are some of the most widely used machine learning models today, especially in domains that necessitate interpretability. We present an algorithm that accelerates the training of random forests and other popular tree-based learning methods. At the core of our algorithm is a novel node-splitting subroutine, dubbed MABSplit, used to efficiently find split points when constructing decision trees. Our algorithm borrows techniques from the multi-armed bandit literature to judiciously determine how to allocate samples and computational power across candidate split points. We provide theoretical guarantees that MABSplit improves the sample complexity of each node split from linear to logarithmic in the number of data points. In some settings, MABSplit leads to 100x faster training (an 99% reduction in training time) without any decrease in generalization performance. We demonstrate similar speedups when MABSplit is used across a variety of forest-based variants, such as Extremely Random Forests and Random Patches. We also show our algorithm can be used in both classification and regression tasks. Finally, we show that MABSplit outperforms existing methods in generalization performance and feature importance calculations under a fixed computational budget. All of our experimental results are reproducible via a one-line script at https://github.com/ThrunGroup/FastForest.
abstract_zh: 随机森林是当今使用最广泛的机器学习模型之一，特别是在需要可解释性的领域。我们提出了一种加速随机森林和其他流行的基于树的学习方法的训练的算法。我们算法的核心是一个新颖的节点分裂子例程，称为 MABSplit，用于在构建决策树时有效地找到分裂点。我们的算法借鉴了多臂老虎机文献中的技术来明智地确定如何在候选分割点之间分配样本和计算能力。我们提供了理论上的保证，MABSplit 提高了每个节点分裂的样本复杂度，从数据点数量上的线性变为对数。在某些设置中，MABSplit 可使训练速度提高 100 倍（训练时间减少 99%），而泛化性能没有任何下降。当 MABSplit 用于各种基于森林的变体（例如极端随机森林和随机补丁）时，我们展示了类似的加速效果。我们还展示了我们的算法可以用于分类和回归任务。最后，我们表明，在固定计算预算下，MABSplit 在泛化性能和特征重要性计算方面优于现有方法。我们所有的实验结果都可以通过 https://github.com/ThrunGroup/FastForest 上的一行脚本重现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MABSplit算法，通过多臂老虎机技术加速随机森林等树模型的训练过程。
AI.motivation: 随机森林因可解释性被广泛使用，但训练效率较低。现有方法在寻找决策树分裂点时存在样本复杂度高、计算耗时的问题。
AI.method: 设计基于多臂老虎机的节点分裂子算法MABSplit，通过智能分配样本和计算资源，将每个节点分裂的样本复杂度从线性降至对数级别。
AI.result: 在保持泛化性能不变的情况下，训练速度提升最高达100倍；适用于多种森林变体及分类/回归任务，在固定计算预算下优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MABSplit有效解决了树模型训练效率问题，兼具速度优势与性能保障，实验结果可复现。

We present an algorithm that accelerates the training of random forests and other popular tree-based learning methods. At the core of our algorithm is a novel node-splitting subroutine, dubbed MABSplit, used to efficiently find split points when constructing decision trees. Our algorithm borrows techniques from the multi-armed bandit literature to judiciously determine how to allocate samples and computational power across candidate split points. We demonstrate similar speedups when MABSplit is used across a variety of forest-based variants, such as Extremely Random Forests and Random Patches. We also show our algorithm can be used in both classification and regression tasks. Finally, we show that MABSplit outperforms existing methods in generalization performance and feature importance calculations under a fixed computational budget. authors_text: Kwangjun Ahn,Sébastien Bubeck,Sinho Chewi,Yin Tat Lee,Felipe Suarez,Yi Zhang
title: Learning threshold neurons via the "edge of stability"
title_zh: 通过“稳定边缘”学习阈值神经元
abstract: Existing analyses of neural network training often operate under the unrealistic assumption of an extremely small learning rate. This lies in stark contrast to practical wisdom and empirical studies, such as the work of J. Cohen et al. (ICLR 2021), which exhibit startling new phenomena (the "edge of stability" or "unstable convergence") and potential benefits for generalization in the large learning rate regime. Despite a flurry of recent works on this topic, however, the latter effect is still poorly understood. In this paper, we take a step towards understanding genuinely non-convex training dynamics with large learning rates by performing a detailed analysis of gradient descent for simplified models of two-layer neural networks. For these models, we provably establish the edge of stability phenomenon and discover a sharp phase transition for the step size below which the neural network fails to learn "threshold-like" neurons (i.e., neurons with a non-zero first-layer bias). This elucidates one possible mechanism by which the edge of stability can in fact lead to better generalization, as threshold neurons are basic building blocks with useful inductive bias for many tasks.
summary: Existing analyses of neural network training often operate under the unrealistic assumption of an extremely small learning rate. This lies in stark contrast to practical wisdom and empirical studies, such as the work of J. Cohen et al. (ICLR 2021), which exhibit startling new phenomena (the "edge of stability" or "unstable convergence") and potential benefits for generalization in the large learning rate regime. Despite a flurry of recent works on this topic, however, the latter effect is still poorly understood. In this paper, we take a step towards understanding genuinely non-convex training dynamics with large learning rates by performing a detailed analysis of gradient descent for simplified models of two-layer neural networks. For these models, we provably establish the edge of stability phenomenon and discover a sharp phase transition for the step size below which the neural network fails to learn "threshold-like" neurons (i.e., neurons with a non-zero first-layer bias). This elucidates one possible mechanism by which the edge of stability can in fact lead to better generalization, as threshold neurons are basic building blocks with useful inductive bias for many tasks.
abstract_zh: 现有的神经网络训练分析通常是在学习率极小的不切实际的假设下进行的。这与实践智慧和实证研究（例如 J. Cohen 等人的工作）形成鲜明对比。 （ICLR 2021），它展示了令人震惊的新现象（“稳定边缘”或“不稳定收敛”）以及大学习率机制中泛化的潜在好处。然而，尽管最近有大量关于这个主题的著作，但人们对后一种效应仍然知之甚少。在本文中，我们通过对两层神经网络的简化模型进行梯度下降的详细分析，朝着理解具有大学习率的真正非凸训练动态迈出了一步。对于这些模型，我们证明建立了稳定性现象的边缘，并发现了步长的急剧相变，低于该步长，神经网络无法学习“类似阈值”的神经元（即具有非零第一层偏差的神经元）。这阐明了一种可能的机制，通过这种机制，稳定性边缘实际上可以带来更好的泛化，因为阈值神经元是基本构建块，对许多任务具有有用的归纳偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析梯度下降法在简化两层神经网络模型中的表现，研究了大学习率下'边缘稳定性'现象与阈值神经元学习之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络训练分析假设极小学习率，但实际研究表明大学习率可能带来更好的泛化性能（如'边缘稳定性'现象），这一机制尚未被充分理解。
AI.method: 对简化两层神经网络模型进行梯度下降分析，证明边缘稳定性现象并发现步长阈值下的相变特性。
AI.result: 证实了边缘稳定性现象的存在，发现步长阈值以下网络无法学习阈值神经元，并揭示了阈值神经元对泛化的积极作用。
AI.conclusion: 边缘稳定性通过促进阈值神经元学习提供有益归纳偏置，为理解大学习率下的泛化机制提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Sebastian Salazar,Samuel Denton,Ansaf Salleb-Aouissi
title: Counterfactual Explanations for Support Vector Machine Models
title_zh: 支持向量机模型的反事实解释
abstract: We tackle the problem of computing counterfactual explanations -- minimal changes to the features that flip an undesirable model prediction. We propose a solution to this question for linear Support Vector Machine (SVMs) models. Moreover, we introduce a way to account for weighted actions that allow for more changes in certain features than others. In particular, we show how to find counterfactual explanations with the purpose of increasing model interpretability. These explanations are valid, change only actionable features, are close to the data distribution, sparse, and take into account correlations between features. We cast this as a mixed integer programming optimization problem. Additionally, we introduce two novel scale-invariant cost functions for assessing the quality of counterfactual explanations and use them to evaluate the quality of our approach with a real medical dataset. Finally, we build a support vector machine model to predict whether law students will pass the Bar exam using protected features, and used our algorithms to uncover the inherent biases of the SVM.
summary: We tackle the problem of computing counterfactual explanations -- minimal changes to the features that flip an undesirable model prediction. We propose a solution to this question for linear Support Vector Machine (SVMs) models. Moreover, we introduce a way to account for weighted actions that allow for more changes in certain features than others. In particular, we show how to find counterfactual explanations with the purpose of increasing model interpretability. These explanations are valid, change only actionable features, are close to the data distribution, sparse, and take into account correlations between features. We cast this as a mixed integer programming optimization problem. Additionally, we introduce two novel scale-invariant cost functions for assessing the quality of counterfactual explanations and use them to evaluate the quality of our approach with a real medical dataset. Finally, we build a support vector machine model to predict whether law students will pass the Bar exam using protected features, and used our algorithms to uncover the inherent biases of the SVM.
abstract_zh: 我们解决计算反事实解释的问题——对翻转不良模型预测的特征进行最小的改变。我们针对线性支持向量机 (SVM) 模型提出了这个问题的解决方案。此外，我们引入了一种考虑加权操作的方法，该方法允许某些功能比其他功能进行更多的更改。特别是，我们展示了如何找到反事实的解释，以提高模型的可解释性。这些解释是有效的，仅更改可操作的特征，接近数据分布，稀疏，并且考虑了特征之间的相关性。我们将其视为混合整数规划优化问题。此外，我们引入了两种新颖的尺度不变成本函数来评估反事实解释的质量，并使用它们来评估我们使用真实医学数据集的方法的质量。最后，我们构建了一个支持向量机模型来预测法学院学生是否会使用受保护的特征通过律师资格考试，并使用我们的算法来揭示 SVM 的固有偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文针对支持向量机模型提出反事实解释方法，通过最小特征变化翻转模型预测结果。
AI.motivation: 提升模型可解释性，确保解释符合实际场景需求，如仅调整可操作特征、保持数据分布接近性及特征相关性。
AI.method: 将反事实解释问题转化为混合整数规划优化问题，并设计两种尺度不变成本函数评估解释质量。
AI.result: 在医疗数据集和法律预测模型中验证方法有效性，揭示SVM模型的潜在偏见。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可生成稀疏、有效且符合实际的反事实解释，有助于增强模型透明度与公平性分析。

authors_text: Onni Kosomaa,Samuli Laine,Tero Karras,Miika Aittala,Jaakko Lehtinen
title: Simulator-Based Self-Supervision for Learned 3D Tomography Reconstruction
title_zh: 基于模拟器的自我监督学习 3D 断层扫描重建
abstract: We propose a deep learning method for 3D volumetric reconstruction in low-dose helical cone-beam computed tomography. Prior machine learning approaches require reference reconstructions computed by another algorithm for training. In contrast, we train our model in a fully self-supervised manner using only noisy 2D X-ray data. This is enabled by incorporating a fast differentiable CT simulator in the training loop. As we do not rely on reference reconstructions, the fidelity of our results is not limited by their potential shortcomings. We evaluate our method on real helical cone-beam projections and simulated phantoms. Our results show significantly higher visual fidelity and better PSNR over techniques that rely on existing reconstructions. When applied to full-dose data, our method produces high-quality results orders of magnitude faster than iterative techniques.
summary: We propose a deep learning method for 3D volumetric reconstruction in low-dose helical cone-beam computed tomography. Prior machine learning approaches require reference reconstructions computed by another algorithm for training. In contrast, we train our model in a fully self-supervised manner using only noisy 2D X-ray data. This is enabled by incorporating a fast differentiable CT simulator in the training loop. As we do not rely on reference reconstructions, the fidelity of our results is not limited by their potential shortcomings. We evaluate our method on real helical cone-beam projections and simulated phantoms. Our results show significantly higher visual fidelity and better PSNR over techniques that rely on existing reconstructions. When applied to full-dose data, our method produces high-quality results orders of magnitude faster than iterative techniques.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在低剂量螺旋锥形束计算机断层扫描中进行 3D 体积重建的深度学习方法。先前的机器学习方法需要通过另一种算法计算的参考重建来进行训练。相比之下，我们仅使用嘈杂的 2D X 射线数据以完全自我监督的方式训练我们的模型。这是通过在训练循环中加入快速可微 CT 模拟器来实现的。由于我们不依赖参考重建，因此我们结果的保真度不受其潜在缺点的限制。我们在真实的螺旋锥束投影和模拟模型上评估我们的方法。我们的结果显示，与依赖现有重建的技术相比，视觉保真度明显更高，PSNR 更好。当应用于全剂量数据时，我们的方法产生高质量结果的速度比迭代技术快几个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模拟器的自监督深度学习方法，用于低剂量螺旋锥束CT的3D体积重建，无需依赖传统方法中的参考重建图像。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法需依赖其他算法生成的参考重建图像进行训练，可能受限于参考图像的质量缺陷。本文旨在通过自监督学习克服这一限制，提升重建质量与效率。
AI.method: 在训练过程中集成快速可微分CT模拟器，仅利用噪声2D X射线数据进行端到端自监督训练，无需参考重建图像。
AI.result: 在真实螺旋锥束投影和模拟体模上，该方法在视觉保真度和PSNR指标上显著优于依赖参考重建的技术，且处理全剂量数据时速度比迭代方法快多个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过自监督学习和可微分模拟器，实现了无需参考重建的高质量3D CT重建，在速度与精度上均优于现有技术，适用于低剂量与全剂量场景。

authors_text: Kushal Chauhan,Rishabh Tiwari,Jan Freyberg,Pradeep Shenoy,Krishnamurthy Dvijotham
title: Interactive Concept Bottleneck Models
title_zh: 交互概念瓶颈模型
abstract: Concept bottleneck models (CBMs) are interpretable neural networks that first predict labels for human-interpretable concepts relevant to the prediction task, and then predict the final label based on the concept label predictions. We extend CBMs to interactive prediction settings where the model can query a human collaborator for the label to some concepts. We develop an interaction policy that, at prediction time, chooses which concepts to request a label for so as to maximally improve the final prediction. We demonstrate that a simple policy combining concept prediction uncertainty and influence of the concept on the final prediction achieves strong performance and outperforms static approaches as well as active feature acquisition methods proposed in the literature. We show that the interactive CBM can achieve accuracy gains of 5-10% with only 5 interactions over competitive baselines on the Caltech-UCSD Birds, CheXpert and OAI datasets.
summary: Concept bottleneck models (CBMs) are interpretable neural networks that first predict labels for human-interpretable concepts relevant to the prediction task, and then predict the final label based on the concept label predictions. We extend CBMs to interactive prediction settings where the model can query a human collaborator for the label to some concepts. We develop an interaction policy that, at prediction time, chooses which concepts to request a label for so as to maximally improve the final prediction. We demonstrate that a simple policy combining concept prediction uncertainty and influence of the concept on the final prediction achieves strong performance and outperforms static approaches as well as active feature acquisition methods proposed in the literature. We show that the interactive CBM can achieve accuracy gains of 5-10% with only 5 interactions over competitive baselines on the Caltech-UCSD Birds, CheXpert and OAI datasets.
abstract_zh: 概念瓶颈模型（CBM）是可解释的神经网络，它首先预测与预测任务相关的人类可解释概念的标签，然后根据概念标签预测预测最终标签。我们将 CBM 扩展到交互式预测设置，其中模型可以向人类协作者查询某些概念的标签。我们开发了一种交互策略，在预测时选择要请求标签的概念，以最大程度地改进最终预测。我们证明，结合概念预测不确定性和概念对最终预测的影响的简单策略可以实现强大的性能，并且优于静态方法以及文献中提出的主动特征获取方法。我们表明，在 Caltech-UCSD Birds、CheXpert 和 OAI 数据集上，与竞争基线相比，交互式 CBM 只需 5 次交互即可实现 5-10% 的准确率提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出交互式概念瓶颈模型（Interactive CBM），通过让模型在预测时主动向人类查询关键概念标签，以提高预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统概念瓶颈模型在预测时无法动态获取人类对关键概念的判断，可能导致预测误差。通过引入人类协作，可针对性提升模型性能，尤其在资源受限场景下更具效率。
AI.method: 设计交互策略，在预测时根据概念预测的不确定性及该概念对最终结果的影响程度，选择性请求人类标注5个关键概念。
AI.result: 在Caltech-UCSD Birds、CheXpert和OAI数据集上，仅需5次交互即可使准确率提升5-10%，优于静态方法和主动特征获取方法。
AI.conclusion: 交互式CBM通过人机协作有效提升模型性能，验证了动态概念查询策略在可解释性与准确性平衡上的优势。

motivation: 传统概念瓶颈模型在预测时无法动态获取人类对关键概念的判断，可能导致预测误差。通过引入人类协作，可针对性提升模型性能，尤其在资源受限场景下更具效率。
method: 设计交互策略，在预测时根据概念预测的不确定性及该概念对最终结果的影响程度，选择性请求人类标注5个关键概念。
result: 在Caltech-UCSD Birds、CheXpert和OAI数据集上，仅需5次交互即可使准确率提升5-10%，优于静态方法和主动特征获取方法。
conclusion: 交互式CBM通过人机协作有效提升模型性能，验证了动态概念查询策略在可解释性与准确性平衡上的优势。
search_text: Interactive Concept Bottleneck Models 交互概念瓶颈模型 Concept bottleneck models (CBMs) are interpretable neural networks that first predict labels for human-interpretable concepts relevant to the prediction task, and then predict the final label based on the concept label predictions. We extend CBMs to interactive prediction settings where the model can query a human collaborator for the label to some concepts. We develop an interaction policy that, at prediction time, chooses which concepts to request a label for so as to maximally improve the final prediction. We demonstrate that a simple policy combining concept prediction uncertainty and influence of the concept on the final prediction achieves strong performance and outperforms static approaches as well as active feature acquisition methods proposed in the literature. We show that the interactive CBM can achieve accuracy gains of 5-10% with only 5 interactions over competitive baselines on the Caltech-UCSD Birds, CheXpert and OAI datasets. 概念瓶颈模型（CBM）是可解释的神经网络，它首先预测与预测任务相关的人类可解释概念的标签，然后根据概念标签预测预测最终标签。我们将 CBM 扩展到交互式预测设置，其中模型可以向人类协作者查询某些概念的标签。我们开发了一种交互策略，在预测时选择要请求标签的概念，以最大程度地改进最终预测。我们证明，结合概念预测不确定性和概念对最终预测的影响的简单策略可以实现强大的性能，并且优于静态方法以及文献中提出的主动特征获取方法。我们表明，在 Caltech-UCSD Birds、CheXpert 和 OAI 数据集上，与竞争基线相比，交互式 CBM 只需 5 次交互即可实现 5-10% 的准确率提升。 本文提出交互式概念瓶颈模型（Interactive CBM），通过让模型在预测时主动向人类查询关键概念标签，以提高预测准确性。 Kushal Chauhan,Rishabh Tiwari,Jan Freyberg,Pradeep Shenoy,Krishnamurthy Dvijotham cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhivar Sourati,Vishnu Priya Prasanna Venkatesh,Darshan Deshpande,Himanshu Rawlani,Filip Ilievski,Hông-Ân Sandlin,Alain Mermoud
title: Robust and Explainable Identification of Logical Fallacies in Natural Language Arguments
title_zh: 自然语言论证中逻辑谬误的稳健且可解释的识别
abstract: The spread of misinformation, propaganda, and flawed argumentation has been amplified in the Internet era. Given the volume of data and the subtlety of identifying violations of argumentation norms, supporting information analytics tasks, like content moderation, with trustworthy methods that can identify logical fallacies is essential. In this paper, we formalize prior theoretical work on logical fallacies into a comprehensive three-stage evaluation framework of detection, coarse-grained, and fine-grained classification. We adapt existing evaluation datasets for each stage of the evaluation. We employ three families of robust and explainable methods based on prototype reasoning, instance-based reasoning, and knowledge injection. The methods combine language models with background knowledge and explainable mechanisms. Moreover, we address data sparsity with strategies for data augmentation and curriculum learning. Our three-stage framework natively consolidates prior datasets and methods from existing tasks, like propaganda detection, serving as an overarching evaluation testbed. We extensively evaluate these methods on our datasets, focusing on their robustness and explainability. Our results provide insight into the strengths and weaknesses of the methods on different components and fallacy classes, indicating that fallacy identification is a challenging task that may require specialized forms of reasoning to capture various classes. We share our open-source code and data on GitHub to support further work on logical fallacy identification.
summary: The spread of misinformation, propaganda, and flawed argumentation has been amplified in the Internet era. Given the volume of data and the subtlety of identifying violations of argumentation norms, supporting information analytics tasks, like content moderation, with trustworthy methods that can identify logical fallacies is essential. In this paper, we formalize prior theoretical work on logical fallacies into a comprehensive three-stage evaluation framework of detection, coarse-grained, and fine-grained classification. We adapt existing evaluation datasets for each stage of the evaluation. We employ three families of robust and explainable methods based on prototype reasoning, instance-based reasoning, and knowledge injection. The methods combine language models with background knowledge and explainable mechanisms. Moreover, we address data sparsity with strategies for data augmentation and curriculum learning. Our three-stage framework natively consolidates prior datasets and methods from existing tasks, like propaganda detection, serving as an overarching evaluation testbed. We extensively evaluate these methods on our datasets, focusing on their robustness and explainability. Our results provide insight into the strengths and weaknesses of the methods on different components and fallacy classes, indicating that fallacy identification is a challenging task that may require specialized forms of reasoning to capture various classes. We share our open-source code and data on GitHub to support further work on logical fallacy identification.
abstract_zh: 在互联网时代，错误信息、宣传和有缺陷的论点的传播被放大了。考虑到数据量和识别违反论证规范的微妙性，使用可以识别逻辑谬误的可靠方法来支持信息分析任务（例如内容审核）至关重要。在本文中，我们将先前关于逻辑谬误的理论工作形式化为检测、粗粒度和细粒度分类的综合三阶段评估框架。我们针对评估的每个阶段调整现有的评估数据集。我们采用基于原型推理、基于实例的推理和知识注入的三类稳健且可解释的方法。这些方法将语言模型与背景知识和可解释的机制结合起来。此外，我们通过数据增强和课程学习策略解决数据稀疏问题。我们的三阶段框架本身整合了现有任务（例如宣传检测）中的先前数据集和方法，作为总体评估测试平台。我们在数据集上广泛评估这些方法，重点关注它们的稳健性和可解释性。我们的结果深入了解了不同成分和谬误类别的方法的优点和缺点，表明谬误识别是一项具有挑战性的任务，可能需要专门形式的推理来捕获各种类别。我们在 GitHub 上分享开源代码和数据，以支持逻辑谬误识别的进一步工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种鲁棒且可解释的逻辑谬误识别框架，通过三阶段评估体系和多种方法结合背景知识与可解释机制，解决自然语言论证中谬误检测的挑战。
AI.motivation: 网络时代虚假信息与错误论证的传播加剧，需开发可信方法辅助内容审核等任务，而现有方法在数据规模与谬误识别细微性上存在不足。
AI.method: 构建三阶段框架（检测、粗粒度分类、细粒度分类），采用原型推理、实例推理和知识注入三类方法，结合语言模型与背景知识，并通过数据增强和课程学习应对数据稀疏问题。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在不同谬误类别和任务组件上表现各异，揭示谬误识别需特定推理模式，且数据增强与知识注入显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 逻辑谬误识别是复杂任务，需结合领域知识与可解释机制，本文框架为后续研究提供开源基准与方法论支持。

authors_text: Pranjal Aggarwal,Pasupuleti Chandana,Jagrut Nemade,Shubham Sharma,Sunil Saumya,Shankar Biradar
title: Hope Speech Detection on Social Media Platforms
title_zh: 希望社交媒体平台上的语音检测
comment: 14 pages, 05 figures. accepted for publication in the book chapter "Cyber Crime in Social Media: Theory and Solutions"
comments: 14 pages, 05 figures. accepted for publication in the book chapter "Cyber Crime in Social Media: Theory and Solutions"
abstract: Since personal computers became widely available in the consumer market, the amount of harmful content on the internet has significantly expanded. In simple terms, harmful content is anything online which causes a person distress or harm. It may include hate speech, violent content, threats, non-hope speech, etc. The online content must be positive, uplifting and supportive. Over the past few years, many studies have focused on solving this problem through hate speech detection, but very few focused on identifying hope speech. This paper discusses various machine learning approaches to identify a sentence as Hope Speech, Non-Hope Speech, or a Neutral sentence. The dataset used in the study contains English YouTube comments and is released as a part of the shared task "EACL-2021: Hope Speech Detection for Equality, Diversity, and Inclusion". Initially, the dataset obtained from the shared task had three classes: Hope Speech, non-Hope speech, and not in English; however, upon deeper inspection, we discovered that dataset relabeling is required. A group of undergraduates was hired to help perform the entire dataset's relabeling task. We experimented with conventional machine learning models (such as Naïve Bayes, logistic regression and support vector machine) and pre-trained models (such as BERT) on relabeled data. According to the experimental results, the relabeled data has achieved a better accuracy for Hope speech identification than the original data set.

Initially, the dataset obtained from the shared task had three classes: Hope Speech, non-Hope speech, and not in English; however, upon deeper inspection, we discovered that dataset relabeling is required. According to the experimental results, the relabeled data has achieved a better accuracy for Hope speech identification than the original data set.
abstract_zh: 自从个人电脑在消费市场广泛使用以来，互联网上有害内容的数量显着增加。简单来说，有害内容是指任何会给人带来痛苦或伤害的在线内容。它可能包括仇恨言论、暴力内容、威胁、不希望的言论等。在线内容必须是积极的、振奋人心的和支持性的。在过去的几年里，许多研究都集中在通过仇恨言论检测来解决这个问题，但很少有研究关注于识别希望言论。本文讨论了各种机器学习方法来识别句子为希望语音、非希望语音或中性句子。研究中使用的数据集包含英语 YouTube 评论，并作为共享任务“EACL-2021：希望语音检测实现平等、多样性和包容性”的一部分发布。最初，从共享任务中获得的数据集分为三类：希望语音、非希望语音和非英语；然而，经过更深入的检查，我们发现需要对数据集进行重新标记。聘请了一组本科生来帮助执行整个数据集的重新标记任务。我们在重新标记的数据上尝试了传统的机器学习模型（例如朴素贝叶斯、逻辑回归和支持向量机）和预训练模型（例如 BERT）。根据实验结果，重新标记的数据比原始数据集取得了更好的Hope语音识别准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过机器学习方法检测社交媒体中的希望言论（Hope Speech）、非希望言论（Non-Hope Speech）及中性言论。
AI.motivation: 互联网有害内容激增，现有研究多聚焦于仇恨言论检测，而对积极的希望言论识别关注不足，需通过技术手段促进网络环境的正向引导。
AI.method: 采用传统机器学习模型（如朴素贝叶斯、逻辑回归、支持向量机）和预训练模型（如BERT），基于重新标注的英文YouTube评论数据集进行实验。
AI.result: 重新标注后的数据集在希望言论识别任务中准确率优于原始数据集。
AI.conclusion: 数据集的重新标注显著提升模型性能，预训练模型在希望言论检测中表现更优，为构建积极网络环境提供技术支撑。

conclusion: 数据集的重新标注显著提升模型性能，预训练模型在希望言论检测中表现更优，为构建积极网络环境提供技术支撑。
search_text: Hope Speech Detection on Social Media Platforms 希望社交媒体平台上的语音检测 Since personal computers became widely available in the consumer market, the amount of harmful content on the internet has significantly expanded. In simple terms, harmful content is anything online which causes a person distress or harm. It may include hate speech, violent content, threats, non-hope speech, etc. The online content must be positive, uplifting and supportive. Over the past few years, many studies have focused on solving this problem through hate speech detection, but very few focused on identifying hope speech. This paper discusses various machine learning approaches to identify a sentence as Hope Speech, Non-Hope Speech, or a Neutral sentence. The dataset used in the study contains English YouTube comments and is released as a part of the shared task "EACL-2021: Hope Speech Detection for Equality, Diversity, and Inclusion". Initially, the dataset obtained from the shared task had three classes: Hope Speech, non-Hope speech, and not in English; however, upon deeper inspection, we discovered that dataset relabeling is required. A group of undergraduates was hired to help perform the entire dataset's relabeling task. We experimented with conventional machine learning models (such as Naïve Bayes, logistic regression and support vector machine) and pre-trained models (such as BERT) on relabeled data. According to the experimental results, the relabeled data has achieved a better accuracy for Hope speech identification than the original data set. 自从个人电脑在消费市场广泛使用以来，互联网上有害内容的数量显着增加。简单来说，有害内容是指任何会给人带来痛苦或伤害的在线内容。它可能包括仇恨言论、暴力内容、威胁、不希望的言论等。在线内容必须是积极的、振奋人心的和支持性的。在过去的几年里，许多研究都集中在通过仇恨言论检测来解决这个问题，但很少有研究关注于识别希望言论。本文讨论了各种机器学习方法来识别句子为希望语音、非希望语音或中性句子。研究中使用的数据集包含英语 YouTube 评论，并作为共享任务“EACL-2021：希望语音检测实现平等、多样性和包容性”的一部分发布。最初，从共享任务中获得的数据集分为三类：希望语音、非希望语音和非英语；然而，经过更深入的检查，我们发现需要对数据集进行重新标记。聘请了一组本科生来帮助执行整个数据集的重新标记任务。我们在重新标记的数据上尝试了传统的机器学习模型（例如朴素贝叶斯、逻辑回归和支持向量机）和预训练模型（例如 BERT）。根据实验结果，重新标记的数据比原始数据集取得了更好的Hope语音识别准确率。 本文旨在通过机器学习方法检测社交媒体中的希望言论（Hope Speech）、非希望言论（Non-Hope Speech）及中性言论。 Pranjal Aggarwal,Pasupuleti Chandana,Jagrut Nemade,Shubham Sharma,Sunil Saumya,Shankar Biradar cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuliang Xiu,Jinlong Yang,Xu Cao,Dimitrios Tzionas,Michael J. Black
title: ECON: Explicit Clothed humans Optimized via Normal integration
title_zh: ECON：通过正常集成优化的显式穿着人类
abstract: The combination of deep learning, artist-curated scans, and Implicit Functions (IF), is enabling the creation of detailed, clothed, 3D humans from images. However, existing methods are far from perfect. IF-based methods recover free-form geometry, but produce disembodied limbs or degenerate shapes for novel poses or clothes. To increase robustness for these cases, existing work uses an explicit parametric body model to constrain surface reconstruction, but this limits the recovery of free-form surfaces such as loose clothing that deviates from the body. What we want is a method that combines the best properties of implicit representation and explicit body regularization. To this end, we make two key observations: (1) current networks are better at inferring detailed 2D maps than full-3D surfaces, and (2) a parametric model can be seen as a "canvas" for stitching together detailed surface patches. Based on these, our method, ECON, has three main steps: (1) It infers detailed 2D normal maps for the front and back side of a clothed person. (2) From these, it recovers 2.5D front and back surfaces, called d-BiNI, that are equally detailed, yet incomplete, and registers these w.r.t. each other with the help of a SMPL-X body mesh recovered from the image. (3) It "inpaints" the missing geometry between d-BiNI surfaces. If the face and hands are noisy, they can optionally be replaced with the ones of SMPL-X. As a result, ECON infers high-fidelity 3D humans even in loose clothes and challenging poses. This goes beyond previous methods, according to the quantitative evaluation on the CAPE and Renderpeople datasets. Perceptual studies also show that ECON's perceived realism is better by a large margin. Code and models are available for research purposes at econ.is.tue.mpg.de
summary: The combination of deep learning, artist-curated scans, and Implicit Functions (IF), is enabling the creation of detailed, clothed, 3D humans from images. However, existing methods are far from perfect. IF-based methods recover free-form geometry, but produce disembodied limbs or degenerate shapes for novel poses or clothes. To increase robustness for these cases, existing work uses an explicit parametric body model to constrain surface reconstruction, but this limits the recovery of free-form surfaces such as loose clothing that deviates from the body. What we want is a method that combines the best properties of implicit representation and explicit body regularization. To this end, we make two key observations: (1) current networks are better at inferring detailed 2D maps than full-3D surfaces, and (2) a parametric model can be seen as a "canvas" for stitching together detailed surface patches. Based on these, our method, ECON, has three main steps: (1) It infers detailed 2D normal maps for the front and back side of a clothed person. (2) From these, it recovers 2.5D front and back surfaces, called d-BiNI, that are equally detailed, yet incomplete, and registers these w.r.t. each other with the help of a SMPL-X body mesh recovered from the image. (3) It "inpaints" the missing geometry between d-BiNI surfaces. If the face and hands are noisy, they can optionally be replaced with the ones of SMPL-X. As a result, ECON infers high-fidelity 3D humans even in loose clothes and challenging poses. This goes beyond previous methods, according to the quantitative evaluation on the CAPE and Renderpeople datasets. Perceptual studies also show that ECON's perceived realism is better by a large margin. Code and models are available for research purposes at econ.is.tue.mpg.de
abstract_zh: 深度学习、艺术家策划的扫描和隐式函数 (IF) 相结合，可以从图像中创建详细的、穿着衣服的 3D 人体。然而，现有的方法还远非完美。基于 IF 的方法可以恢复自由形状的几何形状，但会为新颖的姿势或衣服产生脱离实体的肢体或退化形状。为了提高这些情况的鲁棒性，现有的工作使用显式参数化身体模型来约束表面重建，但这限制了自由形状表面的恢复，例如偏离身体的宽松衣服。我们想要的是一种结合了隐式表示和显式体正则化的最佳特性的方法。为此，我们进行了两个关键观察：（1）当前网络比全 3D 表面更擅长推断详细的 2D 地图，（2）参数模型可以被视为用于将详细表面块拼接在一起的“画布”。基于这些，我们的方法 ECON 具有三个主要步骤：（1）推断穿着衣服的人的正面和背面的详细 2D 法线贴图。 (2) 从这些数据中，它恢复 2.5D 正面和背面，称为 d-BiNI，它们同样详细，但不完整，并记录这些表面。借助从图像中恢复的 SMPL-X 身体网格来相互进行。 (3) 它“修复”了 d-BiNI 表面之间缺失的几何形状。如果脸部和手部有噪音，可以选择更换为 SMPL-X 的。因此，即使穿着宽松的衣服和具有挑战性的姿势，ECON 也能推断出高保真度的 3D 人体。根据对 CAPE 和 Renderpeople 数据集的定量评估，这超越了以前的方法。感知研究还表明，ECON 的感知现实性要好得多。代码和模型可用于研究目的，请访问 econ.is.tue.mpg.de

AI.tldr: 本文提出ECON方法，通过结合隐式表示与显式身体正则化，从图像中生成高保真 clothed 3D 人类模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基于隐式函数的方法在处理新姿态或衣物时易产生肢解或退化形状，而显式参数模型限制了自由表面恢复。需融合两者优势以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: ECON分三步：1）推断人体正反面的详细法线图；2）利用SMPL-X网格对齐生成不完整2.5D表面d-BiNI；3）通过补全算法连接表面并替换噪声部位（如面部和手部）。
AI.result: 在CAPE和Renderpeople数据集上量化评估优于现有方法，感知实验显示真实感显著提升。
AI.conclusion: ECON通过结合隐式细节推理与显式结构约束，实现了复杂姿态和宽松衣物下高保真3D人体重建。

authors_text: Qihang Zhang,Ceyuan Yang,Yujun Shen,Yinghao Xu,Bolei Zhou
title: Towards Smooth Video Composition
title_zh: 迈向流畅的视频合成
abstract: Video generation requires synthesizing consistent and persistent frames with dynamic content over time. This work investigates modeling the temporal relations for composing video with arbitrary length, from a few frames to even infinite, using generative adversarial networks (GANs). First, towards composing adjacent frames, we show that the alias-free operation for single image generation, together with adequately pre-learned knowledge, brings a smooth frame transition without compromising the per-frame quality. Second, by incorporating the temporal shift module (TSM), originally designed for video understanding, into the discriminator, we manage to advance the generator in synthesizing more consistent dynamics. Third, we develop a novel B-Spline based motion representation to ensure temporal smoothness to achieve infinite-length video generation. It can go beyond the frame number used in training. A low-rank temporal modulation is also proposed to alleviate repeating contents for long video generation. We evaluate our approach on various datasets and show substantial improvements over video generation baselines. Code and models will be publicly available at https://genforce.github.io/StyleSV.
summary: Video generation requires synthesizing consistent and persistent frames with dynamic content over time. This work investigates modeling the temporal relations for composing video with arbitrary length, from a few frames to even infinite, using generative adversarial networks (GANs). First, towards composing adjacent frames, we show that the alias-free operation for single image generation, together with adequately pre-learned knowledge, brings a smooth frame transition without compromising the per-frame quality. Second, by incorporating the temporal shift module (TSM), originally designed for video understanding, into the discriminator, we manage to advance the generator in synthesizing more consistent dynamics. Third, we develop a novel B-Spline based motion representation to ensure temporal smoothness to achieve infinite-length video generation. It can go beyond the frame number used in training. A low-rank temporal modulation is also proposed to alleviate repeating contents for long video generation. We evaluate our approach on various datasets and show substantial improvements over video generation baselines. Code and models will be publicly available at https://genforce.github.io/StyleSV.
abstract_zh: 视频生成需要随着时间的推移合成具有动态内容的一致且持久的帧。这项工作研究了使用生成对抗网络（GAN）对时间关系进行建模，以编写任意长度的视频，从几帧到无限长。首先，对于合成相邻帧，我们表明单图像生成的无混叠操作以及充分的预先学习的知识可以带来平滑的帧过渡，而不会影响每帧的质量。其次，通过将最初为视频理解而设计的时间平移模块（TSM）合并到鉴别器中，我们设法提高生成器合成更一致的动态。第三，我们开发了一种新颖的基于 B 样条的运动表示，以确保时间平滑性，从而实现无限长度的视频生成。它可以超出训练中使用的帧数。还提出了低秩时间调制来减少长视频生成的重复内容。我们在各种数据集上评估了我们的方法，并显示出相对于视频生成基线的显着改进。代码和模型将在 https://genforce.github.io/StyleSV 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的视频生成方法，能够合成任意长度（包括无限长）的平滑视频，解决动态内容的时间一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法在处理动态内容和时间关系时存在不足，难以生成长序列且保持帧间平滑性，需改进时间建模以提升生成质量与连续性。
AI.method: 1) 结合单图生成的无混叠操作与预训练知识实现相邻帧平滑过渡；2) 在判别器中引入时序位移模块（TSM）增强动态一致性；3) 提出基于B-Spline的运动表示确保时间平滑性，并设计低秩时序调制缓解长视频重复内容问题。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证方法有效性，相比基线模型显著提升视频生成质量，支持超出训练帧数的无限长视频生成，代码与模型将公开。
AI.conclusion: 通过时间建模创新与运动表示优化，本文方法有效解决了视频生成中的时间连续性难题，为长序列视频合成提供了新思路。

method: 1) 结合单图生成的无混叠操作与预训练知识实现相邻帧平滑过渡；2) 在判别器中引入时序位移模块（TSM）增强动态一致性；3) 提出基于B-Spline的运动表示确保时间平滑性，并设计低秩时序调制缓解长视频重复内容问题。
result: 在多个数据集上验证方法有效性，相比基线模型显著提升视频生成质量，支持超出训练帧数的无限长视频生成，代码与模型将公开。
conclusion: 通过时间建模创新与运动表示优化，本文方法有效解决了视频生成中的时间连续性难题，为长序列视频合成提供了新思路。
search_text: Towards Smooth Video Composition 迈向流畅的视频合成 Video generation requires synthesizing consistent and persistent frames with dynamic content over time. This work investigates modeling the temporal relations for composing video with arbitrary length, from a few frames to even infinite, using generative adversarial networks (GANs). First, towards composing adjacent frames, we show that the alias-free operation for single image generation, together with adequately pre-learned knowledge, brings a smooth frame transition without compromising the per-frame quality. Second, by incorporating the temporal shift module (TSM), originally designed for video understanding, into the discriminator, we manage to advance the generator in synthesizing more consistent dynamics. Third, we develop a novel B-Spline based motion representation to ensure temporal smoothness to achieve infinite-length video generation. It can go beyond the frame number used in training. A low-rank temporal modulation is also proposed to alleviate repeating contents for long video generation. We evaluate our approach on various datasets and show substantial improvements over video generation baselines. Code and models will be publicly available at https://genforce.github.io/StyleSV. 视频生成需要随着时间的推移合成具有动态内容的一致且持久的帧。这项工作研究了使用生成对抗网络（GAN）对时间关系进行建模，以编写任意长度的视频，从几帧到无限长。首先，对于合成相邻帧，我们表明单图像生成的无混叠操作以及充分的预先学习的知识可以带来平滑的帧过渡，而不会影响每帧的质量。其次，通过将最初为视频理解而设计的时间平移模块（TSM）合并到鉴别器中，我们设法提高生成器合成更一致的动态。第三，我们开发了一种新颖的基于 B 样条的运动表示，以确保时间平滑性，从而实现无限长度的视频生成。它可以超出训练中使用的帧数。还提出了低秩时间调制来减少长视频生成的重复内容。我们在各种数据集上评估了我们的方法，并显示出相对于视频生成基线的显着改进。代码和模型将在 https://genforce.github.io/StyleSV 上公开提供。 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的视频生成方法，能够合成任意长度（包括无限长）的平滑视频，解决动态内容的时间一致性问题。 Qihang Zhang,Ceyuan Yang,Yujun Shen,Yinghao Xu,Bolei Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Yushi Lan,Xuyi Meng,Shuai Yang,Chen Change Loy,Bo Dai
title: Self-Supervised Geometry-Aware Encoder for Style-Based 3D GAN Inversion
title_zh: 用于基于样式的 3D GAN 反演的自监督几何感知编码器
comment: An encoder-based 3D GAN inversion method. Project page: https://nirvanalan.github.io/projects/E3DGE/index.html
comments: An encoder-based 3D GAN inversion method. Project page: https://nirvanalan.github.io/projects/E3DGE/index.html
abstract: StyleGAN has achieved great progress in 2D face reconstruction and semantic editing via image inversion and latent editing. While studies over extending 2D StyleGAN to 3D faces have emerged, a corresponding generic 3D GAN inversion framework is still missing, limiting the applications of 3D face reconstruction and semantic editing. In this paper, we study the challenging problem of 3D GAN inversion where a latent code is predicted given a single face image to faithfully recover its 3D shapes and detailed textures. The problem is ill-posed: innumerable compositions of shape and texture could be rendered to the current image. Furthermore, with the limited capacity of a global latent code, 2D inversion methods cannot preserve faithful shape and texture at the same time when applied to 3D models. To solve this problem, we devise an effective self-training scheme to constrain the learning of inversion. The learning is done efficiently without any real-world 2D-3D training pairs but proxy samples generated from a 3D GAN. In addition, apart from a global latent code that captures the coarse shape and texture information, we augment the generation network with a local branch, where pixel-aligned features are added to faithfully reconstruct face details. We further consider a new pipeline to perform 3D view-consistent editing. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art inversion methods in both shape and texture reconstruction quality. Code and data will be released.
summary: StyleGAN has achieved great progress in 2D face reconstruction and semantic editing via image inversion and latent editing. While studies over extending 2D StyleGAN to 3D faces have emerged, a corresponding generic 3D GAN inversion framework is still missing, limiting the applications of 3D face reconstruction and semantic editing. In this paper, we study the challenging problem of 3D GAN inversion where a latent code is predicted given a single face image to faithfully recover its 3D shapes and detailed textures. The problem is ill-posed: innumerable compositions of shape and texture could be rendered to the current image. Furthermore, with the limited capacity of a global latent code, 2D inversion methods cannot preserve faithful shape and texture at the same time when applied to 3D models. To solve this problem, we devise an effective self-training scheme to constrain the learning of inversion. The learning is done efficiently without any real-world 2D-3D training pairs but proxy samples generated from a 3D GAN. In addition, apart from a global latent code that captures the coarse shape and texture information, we augment the generation network with a local branch, where pixel-aligned features are added to faithfully reconstruct face details. We further consider a new pipeline to perform 3D view-consistent editing. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art inversion methods in both shape and texture reconstruction quality. Code and data will be released.
abstract_zh: StyleGAN 通过图像反转和潜在编辑在 2D 人脸重建和语义编辑方面取得了巨大进展。虽然将 2D StyleGAN 扩展到 3D 人脸的研究已经出现，但仍然缺少相应的通用 3D GAN 反转框架，限制了 3D 人脸重建和语义编辑的应用。在本文中，我们研究了 3D GAN 反演的挑战性问题，即在给定单张人脸图像的情况下预测潜在代码，以忠实地恢复其 3D 形状和详细纹理。这个问题是不适定的：无数形状和纹理的组合可以渲染到当前图像。此外，由于全局潜在码的容量有限，2D反演方法在应用于3D模型时无法同时保留忠实的形状和纹理。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一种有效的自训练方案来约束反演的学习。无需任何现实世界的 2D-3D 训练对，而是使用 3D GAN 生成的代理样本，即可高效完成学习。此外，除了捕获粗糙形状和纹理信息的全局潜在代码之外，我们还使用局部分支来增强生成网络，其中添加像素对齐特征以忠实地重建面部细节。我们进一步考虑使用新的管道来执行 3D 视图一致的编辑。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在形状和纹理重建质量方面都优于最先进的反演方法。代码和数据将被发布。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自监督几何感知编码器，解决基于StyleGAN的3D生成对抗网络（GAN）逆向问题，通过单张人脸图像预测潜在码以恢复其3D形状和详细纹理。
AI.motivation: 现有2D StyleGAN逆向方法无法同时保持3D模型的形状与纹理细节，缺乏通用3D GAN逆向框架，限制了3D人脸重建与语义编辑的应用。
AI.method: 设计自监督学习框架，结合全局潜在码与局部特征分支，利用3D GAN生成代理样本进行训练，并引入视图一致编辑流水线。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在形状和纹理重建质量上优于现有最先进的逆向方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法填补了3D GAN逆向框架的空白，为3D人脸重建和语义编辑提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Self-Supervised Geometry-Aware Encoder for Style-Based 3D GAN Inversion 用于基于样式的 3D GAN 反演的自监督几何感知编码器 StyleGAN has achieved great progress in 2D face reconstruction and semantic editing via image inversion and latent editing. While studies over extending 2D StyleGAN to 3D faces have emerged, a corresponding generic 3D GAN inversion framework is still missing, limiting the applications of 3D face reconstruction and semantic editing. In this paper, we study the challenging problem of 3D GAN inversion where a latent code is predicted given a single face image to faithfully recover its 3D shapes and detailed textures. The problem is ill-posed: innumerable compositions of shape and texture could be rendered to the current image. Furthermore, with the limited capacity of a global latent code, 2D inversion methods cannot preserve faithful shape and texture at the same time when applied to 3D models. To solve this problem, we devise an effective self-training scheme to constrain the learning of inversion. The learning is done efficiently without any real-world 2D-3D training pairs but proxy samples generated from a 3D GAN. In addition, apart from a global latent code that captures the coarse shape and texture information, we augment the generation network with a local branch, where pixel-aligned features are added to faithfully reconstruct face details. We further consider a new pipeline to perform 3D view-consistent editing. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art inversion methods in both shape and texture reconstruction quality. Code and data will be released. authors_text: Karl Pertsch,Ruta Desai,Vikash Kumar,Franziska Meier,Joseph J. Lim,Dhruv Batra,Akshara Rai
title: Cross-Domain Transfer via Semantic Skill Imitation
title_zh: 通过语义技能模仿进行跨域传输
abstract: We propose an approach for semantic imitation, which uses demonstrations from a source domain, e.g. human videos, to accelerate reinforcement learning (RL) in a different target domain, e.g. a robotic manipulator in a simulated kitchen. Instead of imitating low-level actions like joint velocities, our approach imitates the sequence of demonstrated semantic skills like "opening the microwave" or "turning on the stove". This allows us to transfer demonstrations across environments (e.g. real-world to simulated kitchen) and agent embodiments (e.g. bimanual human demonstration to robotic arm). We evaluate on three challenging cross-domain learning problems and match the performance of demonstration-accelerated RL approaches that require in-domain demonstrations. In a simulated kitchen environment, our approach learns long-horizon robot manipulation tasks, using less than 3 minutes of human video demonstrations from a real-world kitchen. This enables scaling robot learning via the reuse of demonstrations, e.g. collected as human videos, for learning in any number of target domains.
summary: We propose an approach for semantic imitation, which uses demonstrations from a source domain, e.g. human videos, to accelerate reinforcement learning (RL) in a different target domain, e.g. a robotic manipulator in a simulated kitchen. Instead of imitating low-level actions like joint velocities, our approach imitates the sequence of demonstrated semantic skills like "opening the microwave" or "turning on the stove". This allows us to transfer demonstrations across environments (e.g. real-world to simulated kitchen) and agent embodiments (e.g. bimanual human demonstration to robotic arm). We evaluate on three challenging cross-domain learning problems and match the performance of demonstration-accelerated RL approaches that require in-domain demonstrations. In a simulated kitchen environment, our approach learns long-horizon robot manipulation tasks, using less than 3 minutes of human video demonstrations from a real-world kitchen. This enables scaling robot learning via the reuse of demonstrations, e.g. collected as human videos, for learning in any number of target domains.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种语义模仿的方法，它使用来自源域的演示，例如人类视频，以加速不同目标领域的强化学习（RL），例如模拟厨房中的机器人操纵器。我们的方法不是模仿关节速度等低级动作，而是模仿“打开微波炉”或“打开炉子”等所展示的语义技能的序列。这使我们能够跨环境（例如，现实世界到模拟厨房）和代理实施例（例如，双手人类演示到机器人手臂）转移演示。我们评估三个具有挑战性的跨领域学习问题，并匹配需要域内演示的演示加速 RL 方法的性能。在模拟厨房环境中，我们的方法使用来自真实厨房的不到 3 分钟的人类视频演示来学习长视野机器人操作任务。这使得可以通过重复使用演示来扩展机器人学习，例如收集为人类视频，用于在任意数量的目标领域进行学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过语义技能模仿实现跨领域迁移的方法，利用源领域的演示（如人类视频）加速目标领域（如模拟厨房中的机械臂）的强化学习。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖目标领域的演示数据，而跨领域迁移需解决环境差异和智能体形态差异的问题，且获取目标领域演示成本高昂。
AI.method: 通过模仿高层语义技能（如'打开微波炉'）而非低级动作，实现跨环境（现实到模拟）和跨形态（双臂人类到机械臂）的演示迁移，并在模拟厨房中验证效果。
AI.result: 在三个跨领域任务中达到与目标领域演示加速方法相当的性能，仅需不到3分钟的真实厨房视频即可完成模拟环境中的长时序机械臂操作任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过复用源领域演示（如人类视频），为跨领域机器人学习提供了可扩展的解决方案，降低了目标领域数据依赖性。

Instead of imitating low-level actions like joint velocities, our approach imitates the sequence of demonstrated semantic skills like "opening the microwave" or "turning on the stove". This allows us to transfer demonstrations across environments (e.g. real-world to simulated kitchen) and agent embodiments (e.g. bimanual human demonstration to robotic arm). We evaluate on three challenging cross-domain learning problems and match the performance of demonstration-accelerated RL approaches that require in-domain demonstrations. In a simulated kitchen environment, our approach learns long-horizon robot manipulation tasks, using less than 3 minutes of human video demonstrations from a real-world kitchen. This enables scaling robot learning via the reuse of demonstrations, e.g. collected as human videos, for learning in any number of target domains. 我们提出了一种语义模仿的方法，它使用来自源域的演示，例如人类视频，以加速不同目标领域的强化学习（RL），例如模拟厨房中的机器人操纵器。我们的方法不是模仿关节速度等低级动作，而是模仿“打开微波炉”或“打开炉子”等所展示的语义技能的序列。这使我们能够跨环境（例如，现实世界到模拟厨房）和代理实施例（例如，双手人类演示到机器人手臂）转移演示。我们评估三个具有挑战性的跨领域学习问题，并匹配需要域内演示的演示加速 RL 方法的性能。在模拟厨房环境中，我们的方法使用来自真实厨房的不到 3 分钟的人类视频演示来学习长视野机器人操作任务。这使得可以通过重复使用演示来扩展机器人学习，例如收集为人类视频，用于在任意数量的目标领域进行学习。 本文提出一种通过语义技能模仿实现跨领域迁移的方法，利用源领域的演示（如人类视频）加速目标领域（如模拟厨房中的机械臂）的强化学习。 Karl Pertsch,Ruta Desai,Vikash Kumar,Franziska Meier,Joseph J. Lim,Dhruv Batra,Akshara Rai cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Jennifer J. Sun,Lili Karashchuk,Amil Dravid,Serim Ryou,Sonia Fereidooni,John Tuthill,Aggelos Katsaggelos,Bingni W. Brunton,Georgia Gkioxari,Ann Kennedy,Yisong Yue,Pietro Perona
title: BKinD-3D: Self-Supervised 3D Keypoint Discovery from Multi-View Videos
title_zh: BKinD-3D：从多视图视频中进行自我监督的 3D 关键点发现
comment: CVPR 2023. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/b-kind/3d Code: https://github.com/neuroethology/BKinD-3D
comments: CVPR 2023. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/b-kind/3d Code: https://github.com/neuroethology/BKinD-3D
abstract: Quantifying motion in 3D is important for studying the behavior of humans and other animals, but manual pose annotations are expensive and time-consuming to obtain. Self-supervised keypoint discovery is a promising strategy for estimating 3D poses without annotations. However, current keypoint discovery approaches commonly process single 2D views and do not operate in the 3D space. We propose a new method to perform self-supervised keypoint discovery in 3D from multi-view videos of behaving agents, without any keypoint or bounding box supervision in 2D or 3D. Our method, BKinD-3D, uses an encoder-decoder architecture with a 3D volumetric heatmap, trained to reconstruct spatiotemporal differences across multiple views, in addition to joint length constraints on a learned 3D skeleton of the subject. In this way, we discover keypoints without requiring manual supervision in videos of humans and rats, demonstrating the potential of 3D keypoint discovery for studying behavior.
summary: Quantifying motion in 3D is important for studying the behavior of humans and other animals, but manual pose annotations are expensive and time-consuming to obtain. Self-supervised keypoint discovery is a promising strategy for estimating 3D poses without annotations. However, current keypoint discovery approaches commonly process single 2D views and do not operate in the 3D space. We propose a new method to perform self-supervised keypoint discovery in 3D from multi-view videos of behaving agents, without any keypoint or bounding box supervision in 2D or 3D. Our method, BKinD-3D, uses an encoder-decoder architecture with a 3D volumetric heatmap, trained to reconstruct spatiotemporal differences across multiple views, in addition to joint length constraints on a learned 3D skeleton of the subject. In this way, we discover keypoints without requiring manual supervision in videos of humans and rats, demonstrating the potential of 3D keypoint discovery for studying behavior.
abstract_zh: 量化 3D 运动对于研究人类和其他动物的行为非常重要，但获得手动姿势注释既昂贵又耗时。自监督关键点发现是一种很有前途的策略，用于在没有注释的情况下估计 3D 姿势。然而，当前的关键点发现方法通常处理单个 2D 视图，并且不在 3D 空间中操作。我们提出了一种新方法，可以从行为代理的多视图视频中执行 3D 自监督关键点发现，而无需 2D 或 3D 中的任何关键点或边界框监督。我们的方法 BKinD-3D 使用带有 3D 体积热图的编码器-解码器架构，经过训练可以重建多个视图之间的时空差异，此外还对已学习的主体 3D 骨架进行关节长度约束。通过这种方式，我们无需人工监督即可在人类和大鼠的视频中发现关键点，展示了 3D 关键点发现在研究行为方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需人工标注的3D关键点发现方法BKinD-3D，通过多视角视频实现对人类和老鼠行为的3D姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 手动标注3D运动数据成本高昂且耗时，现有方法多局限于2D视角且无法直接在3D空间操作，需开发无需监督的3D关键点发现技术。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构结合3D体素热图，通过重建多视角时空差异及学习骨骼的关节长度约束实现自监督训练。
AI.result: 在人类和老鼠的视频数据上成功发现关键点，验证了方法在无2D/3D标注情况下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: BKinD-3D为无需人工标注的3D姿态估计提供了新思路，展示了其在行为研究中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Yuying Ge,Annabella Macaluso,Li Erran Li,Ping Luo,Xiaolong Wang
title: Policy Adaptation from Foundation Model Feedback
title_zh: 根据基础模型反馈进行政策调整
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023; Project page: https://geyuying.github.io/PAFF/
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023; Project page: https://geyuying.github.io/PAFF/
abstract: Recent progress on vision-language foundation models have brought significant advancement to building general-purpose robots. By using the pre-trained models to encode the scene and instructions as inputs for decision making, the instruction-conditioned policy can generalize across different objects and tasks. While this is encouraging, the policy still fails in most cases given an unseen task or environment. In this work, we propose Policy Adaptation from Foundation model Feedback (PAFF). When deploying the trained policy to a new task or a new environment, we first let the policy play with randomly generated instructions to record the demonstrations. While the execution could be wrong, we can use the pre-trained foundation models to provide feedback to relabel the demonstrations. This automatically provides new pairs of demonstration-instruction data for policy fine-tuning. We evaluate our method on a broad range of experiments with the focus on generalization on unseen objects, unseen tasks, unseen environments, and sim-to-real transfer. We show PAFF improves baselines by a large margin in all cases. Our project page is available at https://geyuying.github.io/PAFF/
summary: Recent progress on vision-language foundation models have brought significant advancement to building general-purpose robots. By using the pre-trained models to encode the scene and instructions as inputs for decision making, the instruction-conditioned policy can generalize across different objects and tasks. While this is encouraging, the policy still fails in most cases given an unseen task or environment. In this work, we propose Policy Adaptation from Foundation model Feedback (PAFF). When deploying the trained policy to a new task or a new environment, we first let the policy play with randomly generated instructions to record the demonstrations. While the execution could be wrong, we can use the pre-trained foundation models to provide feedback to relabel the demonstrations. This automatically provides new pairs of demonstration-instruction data for policy fine-tuning. We evaluate our method on a broad range of experiments with the focus on generalization on unseen objects, unseen tasks, unseen environments, and sim-to-real transfer. We show PAFF improves baselines by a large margin in all cases. Our project page is available at https://geyuying.github.io/PAFF/
abstract_zh: 视觉语言基础模型的最新进展为构建通用机器人带来了重大进步。通过使用预先训练的模型对场景和指令进行编码作为决策的输入，指令条件策略可以泛化到不同的对象和任务。虽然这令人鼓舞，但由于任务或环境未知，该政策在大多数情况下仍然会失败。在这项工作中，我们提出了基础模型反馈的政策适应（PAFF）。当将经过训练的策略部署到新任务或新环境时，我们首先让策略使用随机生成的指令来记录演示。虽然执行可能会出错，但我们可以使用预先训练的基础模型来提供反馈来重新标记演示。这会自动提供新的演示指令数据对以进行策略微调。我们在广泛的实验中评估我们的方法，重点是对看不见的物体、看不见的任务、看不见的环境和模拟到真实的迁移的概括。我们表明 PAFF 在所有情况下都大幅提高了基线。我们的项目页面位于 https://geyuying.github.io/PAFF/

AI.tldr: 本文提出PAFF方法，通过基础模型反馈实现策略适应，解决视觉语言基础模型在新任务或环境中的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有指令条件策略在面对未见过的任务或环境时表现不佳，需提升其泛化能力以适应新场景。
AI.method: 通过随机生成指令让策略执行并记录演示，利用预训练基础模型提供反馈重新标记数据，从而微调策略。
AI.result: 在未见过的物体、任务、环境及仿真到现实迁移的广泛实验中，PAFF显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PAFF通过自动反馈机制有效提升策略泛化能力，适用于多种未知场景的适应问题。

authors_text: Wenjing Bian,Zirui Wang,Kejie Li,Jia-Wang Bian,Victor Adrian Prisacariu
title: NoPe-NeRF: Optimising Neural Radiance Field with No Pose Prior
title_zh: NoPe-NeRF：在无姿势先验的情况下优化神经辐射场
abstract: Training a Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) without pre-computed camera poses is challenging. Recent advances in this direction demonstrate the possibility of jointly optimising a NeRF and camera poses in forward-facing scenes. However, these methods still face difficulties during dramatic camera movement. We tackle this challenging problem by incorporating undistorted monocular depth priors. These priors are generated by correcting scale and shift parameters during training, with which we are then able to constrain the relative poses between consecutive frames. This constraint is achieved using our proposed novel loss functions. Experiments on real-world indoor and outdoor scenes show that our method can handle challenging camera trajectories and outperforms existing methods in terms of novel view rendering quality and pose estimation accuracy. Our project page is https://nope-nerf.active.vision.
summary: Training a Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) without pre-computed camera poses is challenging. Recent advances in this direction demonstrate the possibility of jointly optimising a NeRF and camera poses in forward-facing scenes. However, these methods still face difficulties during dramatic camera movement. We tackle this challenging problem by incorporating undistorted monocular depth priors. These priors are generated by correcting scale and shift parameters during training, with which we are then able to constrain the relative poses between consecutive frames. This constraint is achieved using our proposed novel loss functions. Experiments on real-world indoor and outdoor scenes show that our method can handle challenging camera trajectories and outperforms existing methods in terms of novel view rendering quality and pose estimation accuracy. Our project page is https://nope-nerf.active.vision.
abstract_zh: 在没有预先计算相机姿势的情况下训练神经辐射场 (NeRF) 具有挑战性。这个方向的最新进展证明了在前向场景中联合优化 NeRF 和相机姿势的可能性。然而，这些方法在摄像机剧烈移动时仍然面临困难。我们通过结合未失真的单目深度先验来解决这个具有挑战性的问题。这些先验是通过在训练期间校正尺度和移位参数生成的，然后我们就能够约束连续帧之间的相对姿势。这个约束是使用我们提出的新颖的损失函数来实现的。对现实世界室内和室外场景的实验表明，我们的方法可以处理具有挑战性的相机轨迹，并且在新颖的视图渲染质量和姿态估计精度方面优于现有方法。我们的项目页面是 https://nope-nerf.active.vision。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NoPe-NeRF方法，在无需预计算相机姿态的情况下优化神经辐射场（NeRF），解决剧烈相机运动场景下的重建难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理剧烈相机运动时仍存在困难，需通过引入深度先验约束帧间相对姿态以提升重建质量与姿态估计精度。
AI.method: 通过训练过程中校正尺度和偏移参数生成无畸变单目深度先验，并设计新型损失函数约束连续帧间相对姿态。
AI.result: 在真实室内外场景实验中，该方法能处理复杂相机轨迹，在新视角渲染质量与姿态估计精度上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了无姿态先验下NeRF训练的挑战，为复杂运动场景的三维重建提供了新思路。
